source: The elevator opens directly into the seventh-floor suite , penthouse-style . The office walls are an eye-popping shade of neon chartreuse , and San Francisco 's picturesque Nob Hill stretches for blocks outside a large window in the reception area . Workers sit before six state-of-the-art **29;5233;TOOLONG , busily adjusting the palettes and design elements that flash on their 15- and 20-inch screens .
domestication: 电梯直接开到七楼的套房，这就像顶层豪华公寓一样。办公室的墙壁漆成了鲜绿色的霓虹色，让人眼前一亮。在接待区的一个大窗户外面，旧金山风景如画的诺布山（Nob Hill）一眼望去整整几个街区。员工们坐在电脑前，这些电脑都是最新款的高科技产品，他们正忙着调整屏幕上闪烁的色彩板和设计元素。屏幕有15英寸和20英寸两种大小，映入眼帘的是一片忙碌的景象。

source: I should say something about fans . Compared with science fiction , mysteries barely have a true fandom . Science-fiction fans hold dozens of conventions annually , read everything written in their chosen field and nothing outside it , publish innumerable amateur magazines and newsletters ( " fanzines " ) , and , according to one of the field 's leading editors , are all fifteen-year-old boys who are n't very well socialized .
domestication: 说到粉丝，我得说说科幻迷和推理迷的区别。相比之下，推理小说基本上没有真正的粉丝群体。科幻迷每年举办数十个大会，什么都读，但全是自己喜欢的类型，什么都不愿意涉足其他领域，出版无数的业余杂志和通讯（“粉丝杂志”），而且根据该领域的一位资深编辑说，这些科幻迷大多是十五岁左右的小孩，社会性也不强。
foreignization: 我应该说一些关于粉丝的事情。与科幻小说相比，悬疑小说几乎没有真正的粉丝群体。科幻小说的粉丝每年举办数十个大会，在他们选择的领域内读遍所有作品，而不看领域以外的东西，并出版无数的业余杂志和通讯（“粉丝杂志”），而根据该领域的一位主要编辑，他们都是十五岁的男孩，而且社交能力不是很好。

source: So there . Mystery solved . An NHL team president , searching for comfy shortcuts , drifts from conventional formality and instead winds up here , sitting in his office on a busy afternoon in mid-February , fielding questions about fashion , explaining that , really , there is no explanation at all .
domestication: 原来如此，这个谜底终于揭晓了！一家NHL球队的总裁为了寻找舒适的捷径，偏离了传统的正式套路，结果却坐在办公室里，回答关于时尚的问题，解释说，其实，这一切都是没有什么可解释的。这么一来，就弄得大家都很困惑，你说是不是？于是，在二月中旬的一个繁忙的下午，他就这样回答着问题，实话实说，也没什么好解释的。

source: The biggest complaint about prescription drugs is their cost , even though Americans devote more money to alcohol and almost as much to tobacco . Last year overall pharmaceutical spending increased by 17.4 percent , creating the perception of runaway prices -- and corresponding political pressure for government action .
domestication: 处方药的最大问题就是价格太高，尽管美国人在酒精和烟草上的花费几乎与药品不相上下。去年，整体的药品支出增加了17.4%，这让人们觉得价格失控，于是政府也开始面临制定相关政策来干预药价的压力。
foreignization: 处方药最大的抱怨是它们的成本，尽管美国人在酒精上花费更多的钱，并且几乎和在烟草产品上花费的一样多。去年，整体药品支出增加了17.4％，造成了价格失控的印象--以及随之而来的政治压力，要求政府采取行动。

source: That 's right , iron , a.k.a. kryptonite to men . Studies have linked high levels of iron , in excess of 10 milligrams a day , to an increased risk of heart disease in men . But if you 're too good about watching your iron intake and you 're on a low-fat diet that 's light on meat , you could be coming up short . Without enough iron , your body has trouble ferrying oxygen through your bloodstream and dropping it off where you need it most : your brain . " When oxygen is n't reaching the brain , you feel light-headed and tired . Cognitive performance can suffer , too , " says Gary Miller , Ph.D. , a professor of health at Wake Forest University .
domestication: 铁这东西，对男人来说简直就是克星。研究表明，男人每天摄入超过10毫克的铁，患心脏病的风险会增加。但如果你太注意控制铁的摄入，吃的是低脂肪的肉类食物，你可能会摄入不足。铁摄入不足，你的身体就难以将氧气输送到血液中，并且无法将其送到最需要的地方：你的大脑。北卡罗来纳大学健康学教授加里·米勒博士说：“当氧气没有输送到大脑时，你会感到头晕和疲倦，认知能力也会受到影响。”其实，铁元素在人体中起着非常重要的作用，它是造血的重要原料，帮助运送氧气到全身各个组织，对保持身体健康至关重要。所以，适量的铁摄入是非常必要的。
foreignization: 没错，铁，也就是对男人来说的氪星石。研究表明，每天超过10毫克的高铁含量与男性的心脏病风险增加有关。但如果你在控制铁的摄入方面做得太好，并且正在进行低脂肪饮食，肉类摄入量很少，你可能会铁元素摄入不足。没有足够的铁，你的身体就难以将氧气通过血液输送到需要的地方：你的大脑。“当氧气不能到达大脑时，你会感到头晕和疲倦。认知性能也会受到影响，”韦克森林大学健康学教授加里·米勒博士说。

That 's right , iron , a.k.a. kryptonite to men . Studies have linked high levels of iron , in excess of 10 milligrams a day , to an increased risk of heart disease in men . But if you 're too good about watching your iron intake and you 're on a low-fat diet that 's light on meat , you could be coming up short . Without enough iron , your body has trouble ferrying oxygen through your bloodstream and dropping it off where you need it most : your brain . " When oxygen is n't reaching the brain , you feel light-headed and tired . Cognitive performance can suffer , too , " says Gary Miller , Ph.D. , a professor of health at Wake Forest University .

source: IN THE MODERN imagination , the medieval knight is a glamorous figure . No other warrior in Western history seems so admirable , so devoted to causes beyond the nasty realities of the battlefield . Dressed in shining armor , astride a magnificent horse , he carries his lady 's favor and embodies a chivalric ideal that to this day suggests courtesy and high-mindedness . His life , it seems , was surrounded by ritual : colorful tournaments at which he honed his skills , religious ceremonies that endowed his mundane pursuits with an aura of divine justification .
domestication: 在现代人的想象中，中世纪的骑士是一个非常有魅力的形象。在西方历史上，似乎没有哪个战士能像他们那样令人尊敬和崇拜，他们不仅仅关心战场上的残酷现实，还致力于更高尚的事业。穿着闪亮的盔甲，骑着雄壮的战马，他们手持主君或爱人的纹章，体现了骑士精神，这种精神至今仍然代表着礼貌和高尚。他们的生活似乎被各种仪式所包围：五彩缤纷的比赛使他们磨练技能，宗教仪式使他们平凡的追求具有神圣的正当性。
foreignization: 在现代人的想象中，中世纪骑士是一个光彩夺目的人物，没有其他西方历史上的武士似乎如此令人钦佩，如此致力于超越战场丑陋现实的目标。身穿闪亮的盔甲，骑着一匹壮丽的马，他带着女士的青睐，体现了一种骑士理想，这种理想至今仍然意味着礼貌和高尚。他的一生，似乎被仪式所包围：他在那里磨练技能的五彩缤纷的锦标赛，他平凡的追求被宗教仪式赋予了神圣的正当理由的气息。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

IN THE MODERN imagination , the medieval knight is a glamorous figure . No other warrior in Western history seems so admirable , so devoted to causes beyond the nasty realities of the battlefield . Dressed in shining armor , astride a magnificent horse , he carries his lady 's favor and embodies a chivalric ideal that to this day suggests courtesy and high-mindedness . His life , it seems , was surrounded by ritual : colorful tournaments at which he honed his skills , religious ceremonies that endowed his mundane pursuits with an aura of divine justification .
在现代人的想象中，中世纪的骑士是一个非常有魅力的形象。在西方历史上，似乎没有哪个战士能像他们那样令人尊敬和崇拜，他们不仅仅关心战场上的残酷现实，还致力于更高尚的事业。穿着闪亮的盔甲，骑着雄壮的战马，他们手持主君或爱人的纹章，体现了骑士精神，这种精神至今仍然代表着礼貌和高尚。他们的生活似乎被各种仪式所包围：五彩缤纷的比赛使他们磨练技能，宗教仪式使他们平凡的追求具有神圣的正当性。

Translate the following text to Chinese.

IN THE MODERN imagination , the medieval knight is a glamorous figure . No other warrior in Western history seems so admirable , so devoted to causes beyond the nasty realities of the battlefield . Dressed in shining armor , astride a magnificent horse , he carries his lady 's favor and embodies a chivalric ideal that to this day suggests courtesy and high-mindedness . His life , it seems , was surrounded by ritual : colorful tournaments at which he honed his skills , religious ceremonies that endowed his mundane pursuits with an aura of divine justification .
在现代人的想象中，中世纪骑士是一个光彩夺目的人物，没有其他西方历史上的武士似乎如此令人钦佩，如此致力于超越战场丑陋现实的目标。身穿闪亮的盔甲，骑着一匹壮丽的马，他带着女士的青睐，体现了一种骑士理想，这种理想至今仍然意味着礼貌和高尚。他的一生，似乎被仪式所包围：他在那里磨练技能的五彩缤纷的锦标赛，他平凡的追求被宗教仪式赋予了神圣的正当理由的气息。

source: Tales of wholesale vandalism also come from Estonia . Journalists recently visiting the large submarine base at Paldiski reported scuttled warships and bizarre attempts to burn buoys and docks . It will cost Estonia huge sums simply to clean up the Paldiski harbor and to ascertain that no radioactive , toxic , or explosive materials have been dumped there . The demolition apparently started just weeks after Russia indicated to Estonia that it wanted to keep Paldiski as a strategic base even after other forces were withdrawn .
domestication: 爱沙尼亚也传来大规模破坏的消息。最近有一些记者参观了位于帕尔迪斯基的大型潜艇基地，看到了一艘艘沉没的军舰和一些奇怪的行为，譬如有人试图烧毁浮标和码头。单单是清理帕尔迪斯基港口，就会让爱沙尼亚花费一大笔钱，而且还得确认那里没有放射性、有毒或易爆物品。显然，这场破坏大约在俄罗斯通知爱沙尼亚希望在其他军队撤离后继续保留帕尔迪斯基作为战略基地的几周之后就开始了。
foreignization: 爱沙尼亚也有大量破坏事件的报告。最近到访帕尔迪斯基大型潜艇基地的记者报道说，遇到了被故意凿沉的战舰，以及人们试图焚烧浮标和码头的奇怪尝试。清理帕尔迪斯基港口，并且确定那里没有放射性、有毒或爆炸性物质被丢弃，对爱沙尼亚来说将会花费巨大的资金。很明显，这次破坏发生在俄罗斯向爱沙尼亚表明希望即使其他部队撤离后也要继续保持帕尔迪斯基作为战略基地的意图几周之后。

source: More government money is spent studying this disease than other major cancers , although far less than is spent on AIDS . As with AIDS , for years politicians ignored this rising epidemic . But taking their cue from AIDS activists , increasingly vocal breast-cancer groups have turned their anger on Congress and on state legislatures . They , in turn , have funneled more resources into research on treatment and cure .
domestication: 政府投入的资金来研究这种疾病比其他主要癌症都多，尽管远远少于用于艾滋病的资金。和艾滋病一样，多年来政客们一直忽视这场不断上升的疫情。但是，受艾滋病活动家的启发，越来越有发言权的乳腺癌组织将他们的愤怒转向了国会和州立法机构。这些机构反过来又将更多的资源投入到治疗和治愈的研究中。现在，情况开始有所改善，人们对乳腺癌的认识也越来越多。

source: The upshot of the meeting was another good news/bad news scenario . On the positive side , 701 Sutter was in " line of sight " of not one but two WinStar transmitters , which meant that the building had two separate access points into WinStar 's network . On the downside , Davey 's building was far too small for WinStar to consider wiring on its own dime , since the way the company recoups the cost of its free equipment installation is through acquiring new onsite customers for its services . " Typically , WinStar targets buildings that have at least 60,000 to 100,000 square feet , " says Davey . " Mine is only 20,000 total . "
domestication: 会议的结果是好消息和坏消息并存。一方面，好消息是，萨特街701号位于两个WinStar发射器的视线范围内，这意味着大楼有两个独立的接入点可以进入WinStar的网络。另一方面，坏消息是，戴维的大楼对WinStar来说太小了，无法自费布线，因为这家公司通过为新客户提供服务来收回免费设备安装的成本。“通常，WinStar会以至少6万到10万平方英尺的建筑为目标，”戴维说。“而我的大楼只有2万平方英尺。”这就像“画龙点睛”的问题，如果不能给WinStar带来足够的利润，他们是不会轻易投资的。
foreignization: 会议的结果是另一个好消息/坏消息的情景。在积极的一面，701 Sutter 在“视线范围内”不止一个，而是两个WinStar发射器，这意味着该建筑有两个独立的接入点进入WinStar的网络。在负面上，Davey的大楼对于WinStar来说太小了，无法考虑用自己的钱来布线，因为公司收回其免费设备安装成本的方式是通过获得其服务的新现场客户。“通常，WinStar的目标是至少有6万到10万平方英尺的建筑”，Davey说。“我的只有2万平方英尺。”

source: Jay 's rise seemed easy , but he was practicing every day . " For years every morning he 'd wake up and be in the mirror rhyming to hisself , " says Be-Hi , " to hear himself and see how he 's pronouncing words and checkin ' his flow . Every morning . You know how some people get up and do they calisthenics every morning ? That was his thing . "
domestication: 杰伊的成名看起来很轻松，但他每天都在努力练习。他的朋友Be-Hi说：“多年来，每个早晨他都会对着镜子自己跟自己押韵，听自己的声音，检查自己如何发音和语调。每个早晨，他都会这样做。你知道有些人每天早上会做一些轻体操吗？他也是这样，只不过他是在练习说唱。这样每天坚持不懈地训练，是他成功的秘诀。”

source: An abnormally high level of iron in the body is associated with prostate cancer , and researchers from the Cancer Science Institute of Singapore ( CSI Singapore ) at the National University of Singapore may have uncovered the mechanism to explain this link . They have found the role of the iron storage gene , FTH1 , and its pseudogenes in regulating iron levels in cells and slowing down prostate cancer growth . The new findings could pave the way for future developments in prostate cancer diagnostics and therapeutics .
domestication: 体内铁含量过高与前列腺癌有关，新加坡国立大学的癌症科学研究所（CSI Singapore）研究人员可能已经揭开了这种关联背后的机制。他们发现铁贮存基因FTH1及其伪基因在调节细胞铁水平和减缓前列腺癌生长方面发挥着重要作用。这一新发现有望为未来前列腺癌的诊断和治疗带来新的发展方向。
foreignization: 身体中异常高的铁含量与前列腺癌有关，新加坡国立大学的新加坡癌症科学研究所（CSI Singapore）的研究人员可能已经揭示了这种联系的机制。他们发现了铁储存基因FTH1及其假基因在调节细胞中的铁含量和减缓前列腺癌生长方面的作用。这些新发现可能为未来的前列腺癌诊断和治疗方法铺平道路。

source: Apart from our own concern in the comic book field for the welfare of our civil liberties , there is a sense that a precedent-setting prosecution of a photocopied minicomic represents the dangerous thin end of a very large wedge . SUSAN ALSTON , EXECUTIVE DIRECTOR COMIC BOOK LEGAL DEFENSE FUND NORTHAMPTON , MASS .
domestication: 除了我们在漫画领域对公民自由福祉的关心外，还有这样一种感觉：对一份影印的小型漫画进行先例性的起诉，这代表着一个非常危险的先例。 这就好像“扬汤止沸”，如果任由这种趋势发展下去，那么将会带来不可预测的后果。 COMIC BOOK LEGAL DEFENSE FUND（漫画法律辩护基金会）的执行董事SUSAN ALSTON在马萨诸塞州的北安普顿如是说。

source: Consider Cuts , a 30-minute fitness franchise for men that recently launched Cuts Women . Many Cuts Women customers are former Curves members who are sold on the idea of a 30-minute workout but are bored with Curves ' routine and want something more intense , says John Gennaro , founder of the franchise , Which is based in Clark , New Jersey . With 90 locations and 15,000 members , Cuts is puny compared with Curves . But that does n't bother Gennaro . He 's happy to let Curves educate women about 30-minute fitness -- and even happier to provide an alternative when they grow restless .

source: " In Des Moines yesterday , a group of preschoolers along with their parents and teachers followed Carly right into the event she was speaking at for Iowa Right to Life , " campaign manager Sarah Isgur Flores said in a statement . " Earlier , she 'd run into the kids in the Botanical Gardens and watched the Koi with them for a while . I guess the kids must have thought she was pretty neat because then their teachers and parents and the kids all followed Carly into the event complete with Carly stickers . "
domestication: 在德梅因市昨天，一群幼儿园的孩子们和他们的家长及老师一起跟着卡莉进入了她正在参加的活动会场，这个活动是由爱荷华州生命权利组织举办的。竞选经理萨拉·伊斯古尔·弗洛雷斯在一份声明中说，之前，卡莉在植物园碰到了这些孩子，他们一起观赏了锦鲤。看来孩子们觉得卡莉挺不错的，因为后来他们的老师、家长和孩子们都跟着卡莉进入了活动会场，并且还贴上了卡莉的贴纸。

source: Be patient in your puppy pursuit . I was . I spent more than a year researching different breeds , visiting shelters and breeders , and discussing the pros and cons of my " finalists " with veterinarians and animal behaviorists . " Investing time doing your homework before you adopt a puppy can pay off in the long ran , " says Rolan Tripp , DVM , a veterinarian who operates AnimalBehavior.Net , an online source of information on pet selection and animal behavior . " You ' re much more likely to find a dog that ideally fits into your lifestyle . " For a link to Dr. Tripp 's Web site , visit www.prevention.com/links Just Right for You
domestication: 养只小狗要有耐心，我当时就是这样。我花了超过一年时间研究不同品种的狗，参观庇护所和繁殖场，并与兽医和动物行为学家讨论我心仪的“候选者”的优缺点。动物行为网（AnimalBehavior.Net）的创始人罗兰·特里普博士（Rolan Tripp）说：“在领养小狗之前做足功课，可以让你长远受益。”罗兰·特里普博士是一位兽医，也是这家在线信息来源网站的经营者。他说：“如果你提前做好准备，就更有可能找到一只适合你的生活方式的狗。”想要了解更多信息，请访问www.prevention.com/links。

source: According to the latest Economist/YouGov survey , Trump is winning just 23 percent of the Hispanic vote -- 4 points behind Romney -- 37 percent of the female vote -- 7 points behind Romney -- and 3 percent of the black vote ( Romney won only 6 percent in a contest against the country 's first black president , while President George W. Bush captured 11 percent of the black vote in his 2004 re-election ) .  RELATED CONTENT
domestication: 根据最新的《经济学人》/尤戈夫调查，特朗普只获得了23%的西班牙裔选民的支持，比罗姆尼少了4个百分点；获得了37%的女性选民的支持，比罗姆尼少了7个百分点；而且只获得了3%的非裔美国人选民的支持。相比之下，罗姆尼在和美国首位黑人总统竞选时，也只获得了6%的非裔美国人选民的支持，而布什总统在2004年连任时，则获得了11%的非裔美国人选民的支持。

source: The financing was the biggest unknown going into it . I talked to a couple of colleagues and friends who had previously purchased to get a sense of which mortgage lenders to use . Looking back on it , I should have done a whole lot more research . I knew I was in a low-rate environment , that my credit score was really good . That 's pretty much all I knew . I worked with a really great mortgage broker and ultimately I ended up going with a 10-year adjustable-rate mortgage . The post-crisis consumer financial protections made me feel really comfortable with an ARM . This was not my forever home . I would use it as an investment or a stepping stone . The rate is maxed at 2.125% . Yeah , it 's a REALLY good interest rate .
domestication: 买房的过程中，最不确定的是如何融资。我和一些同事朋友讨论过，他们之前都有买房的经验，所以我请教他们应该选择哪家贷款机构。回想起来，我当时应该做更多的研究。我知道当时利率很低，我的信用评分也很好，就只有这些了。幸好我找到了一位很好的抵押贷款经纪人，最终我选择了浮动利率的10年抵押贷款。在金融危机之后出台的消费者金融保护政策让我感到安心。毕竟这不是我的永久居所，我只是把它当作投资或者跳板。利率上限是2.125%，说实话，这个利率真的非常有吸引力。
foreignization: 融资是开始时最大的未知数。我和几个之前购买过房子的同事和朋友聊了聊，了解他们使用哪些抵押贷款机构。回想起来，我应该做更多的研究。我知道我处在低利率环境中，我的信用评分非常好。除此之外，我什么都不知道。我和一位优秀的抵押贷款中介合作，最终我选择了10年浮动利率抵押贷款。危机后的消费者金融保护措施使我对浮动利率感到非常放心。这不是我的永远的家。我会把它当作投资或垫脚石来用。利率最高为2.125%。是的，这是一个非常好的利率。

source: Panama also found itself on the Plowshare target list . The 50-year-old Panama Canal had proven too small for the supertankers of the day . The U.S. wanted to build a new waterway though Panama 's Darin province ; nothing short of a nuclear blast could cut through the flooded rain forests and 1,000-foot-high mountains .

source: L : OBSERVE THE MOON Woodcock fly mostly at night , so the moon may serve as a navigational tool . Data show that autumn woodcock movement increases with a gibbous ( more than 50 percent lit ) moon . A waxing moon -- one moving toward full -- seems to induce greater woodcock movement than a waning moon .
domestication: 木cock 是夜行性鸟类，所以月亮可能是它们导航的工具。数据显示，秋季木cock 的活动量在月亮大于半圆（超过50%明亮）时会增加。而且，月亮越来越圆的时候，木cock 的活动量也会更大。看来，月亮的变化确实对这些鸟儿有影响，好像它们也喜欢在“月上柳梢头”的时候出门玩儿。
foreignization: L：观察月亮 鹧鸪主要在夜间飞行，因此月亮可以作为一种导航工具。数据显示，秋季鹧鸪的活动量会随着月亮的盈满（超过50％亮度）而增加。一个渐盈的月亮——即逐渐变成满月的月亮——似乎比渐亏的月亮能诱发更多的鹧鸪移动。

source: Ballet increases flexibility from head to toe more than other dance styles . And the focus on posture will have you standing taller and moving more gracefully even off the dance floor . A study from England showed that ballet dancers outscored swimmers on 7 out of 10 fitness tests such as strength .
domestication: 芭蕾舞是最能全面锻炼身体柔韧性的舞蹈，哪怕只是练习一下站姿，你都能感觉到自己从头到脚都变软了。而且，经常练习芭蕾舞，你会发现自己的姿势端正了，走路都会带着优雅的气质。英国的一个研究显示，芭蕾舞者在十项身体素质测试中有七项超越了游泳运动员，其中就包括力量这一项。
foreignization: 芭蕾舞比其他舞蹈风格能提高从头到脚的柔韧性更好。 而且注重姿势会使你站得更直， 即使在舞池外移动也更优雅。 英国的一项研究表明，芭蕾舞者在力量等10个健身测试中有7项超过了游泳运动员。

source: The Moche were agriculturalists . They grew a wide variety of crops , including corn , beans , guava , avocados , squash , chiles , and peanuts . From the Pacific Ocean , as well as from rivers , marshes , and lagoons , they harvested a rich catch of fish , shrimp , crabs , crayfish , and mollusks . Domesticated llamas , guinea pigs , and ducks were additional sources of food , along with land mammals , birds , snails , and wild plants , which were occasionally hunted or gathered .
domestication: 莫切人主要以种植为生，他们的田地里有很多种类的农作物，比如玉米、豆子、番石榴、牛油果、南瓜、辣椒和花生等。此外，他们还会从太平洋、大河、沼泽和泻湖里捕捞鱼、虾、螃蟹、龙虾和贝类，这些都是他们的主食。他们养了骆驼、豚鼠和鸭子等家禽，另外，还会打猎或采集陆生动物、鸟类、蜗牛和野生植物。这些都丰富了他们的餐桌。
foreignization: 莫切人是农民。他们种植了多种农作物，包括玉米、豆类、番石榴、牛油果、南瓜、辣椒和花生。在太平洋以及河流、沼泽和泻湖中，他们收获了大量的鱼、虾、蟹、螯虾和软体动物。驯化的羊驼、豚鼠和鸭子是食物的额外来源，还有陆地哺乳动物、鸟类、蜗牛和野生植物，这些食物偶尔会被狩猎或采集。

Domesticated llamas , guinea pigs , and ducks were additional sources of food , along with land mammals , birds , snails , and wild plants , which were occasionally hunted or gathered .

source: Other investigators question the group 's emphasis on Hsp90 . " People are fixated on the heat shock proteins . I 'm not convinced that 's the story , " says Baum . He speculates that changing the activity of other proteins during development may also unleash hidden variation in plants and animals .

source: The researchers used eye-tracking techniques to record where people spent the most time gazing at each image , whether it was on areas of the image that were more negative -- such as the faces of those in suffering -- or on less emotionally charged parts of the image . They also compared this to how much time each participant looked at the socially relevant areas of neutral images , like the face of a person walking down the street .
domestication: 研究人员采用眼动跟踪技术来记录人们在每张图片上花费时间最长的区域是在哪里，不管是图片中比较负面的一部分，比如受苦者的脸，还是比较中性的区域。他们还将其与参与者在中性图片上的社交相关区域（比如街上行走的人的脸）上花费的时间进行了对比。结果发现人们更倾向于关注带有情感色彩的图片，尤其是负面情绪较强的图片。这说明人们天生就具有同理心和社会性，会在无意识中去关注他人的情绪状态。
foreignization: 研究人员使用眼动追踪技术记录人们在每幅图像上花费的时间最多的是盯着哪里，是否是图像中更负面区域 - 比如那些受苦者的脸 - 或是图像中情感色彩较少的部分。他们还将其与每位参与者花费在中性图像社会相关区域上的时间进行比较，例如走在街上的人的脸。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

The researchers used eye-tracking techniques to record where people spent the most time gazing at each image , whether it was on areas of the image that were more negative -- such as the faces of those in suffering -- or on less emotionally charged parts of the image . They also compared this to how much time each participant looked at the socially relevant areas of neutral images , like the face of a person walking down the street .

source: The reason for this sudden interest in Tribune , and potentially a wave of further purchases , stems from a decision made on April 20th by Trump 's FCC chief , Ajit Pai . If you 're unaware , the rules around media ownership say that you ca n't own stations that reach more than 39 percent of US households . The rule is designed to prevent one company from gaining undue influence over the flow of information to people .
domestication: 这突然涌现的对Tribune的兴趣，以及可能随之而来的购买热潮，其根源在于特朗普任命的FCC局长阿吉特·帕伊（Ajit Pai）四月二十日做出的决定。如果你不知道的话，媒体所有权的规则规定，你不能拥有覆盖超过美国39%家庭的电视频道。这个规则的目的是防止一家公司对信息流向民众施加不当影响。说白了，就是防止某个巨头垄断媒体，操控舆论。
foreignization: 这种突然的兴趣源于特朗普的联邦通信委员会（FCC）主席阿吉特·帕伊（Ajit Pai）在4月20日做出的一个决定，如果你不知道的话，媒体所有权的规定说，你不能拥有覆盖超过美国39%的家庭的电台。该规则旨在防止一家公司对信息流向公众施加不当影响。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

The reason for this sudden interest in Tribune , and potentially a wave of further purchases , stems from a decision made on April 20th by Trump 's FCC chief , Ajit Pai . If you 're unaware , the rules around media ownership say that you ca n't own stations that reach more than 39 percent of US households . The rule is designed to prevent one company from gaining undue influence over the flow of information to people .

The rule is designed to prevent one company from gaining undue influence over the flow of information to people .
这种突然的兴趣源于特朗普的联邦通信委员会（FCC）主席阿吉特·帕伊（Ajit Pai）在4月20日做出的一个决定，如果你不知道的话，媒体所有权的规定说，你不能拥有覆盖超过美国39%的家庭的电台。该规则旨在防止一家公司对信息流向公众施加不当影响。

source: Almost half of the respondents to the Hall of Fame survey said they had stuck to their company 's original mission , through thick and thin . A whopping 83% said they had achieved growth in the areas they 'd anticipated it to come from -- many in computer-related fields , although traditional businesses like a travel agency , a restaurant chain , and a plastic-lawn-chair manufacturer are also represented in the Hall of Fame .

source: Franklin Lischke- the freckle-faced lad in the middledid n't have to go far out of his way to pose for this picture . His father owned the building in New Rochelle that the artist used as a studio . If the boy was n't modeling , Norman found other duties for Franklin . Over time , his interest in Rockwell 's work grew , inspiring him to study art and make it his career . Franklin eventually became an established commercial artist in New York City specializing in fashion illustration for stores like Bloomingdale 's and Saks . I had an opportunity to interview a much older Franklin at length . He recalled how Rockwell always encouraged models to share feedback about his paintings .
domestication: 弗兰克林·利施克，这个满脸雀斑的年轻人，不需要绕远路就能在这张照片上留下自己的身影。他的父亲在纽罗谢尔拥有一栋建筑，而这栋建筑正是这位艺术家用作工作室的地方。如果这个男孩不需要摆姿势，诺曼就会为他找到其他事情做。随着时间的推移，弗兰克林对洛克威尔作品的兴趣逐渐增长，于是他开始学习艺术，并将其作为自己的职业。最终，弗兰克林成为了纽约市的一位成熟的商业艺术家，专门为布鲁明黛尔和塞克斯等百货公司进行时尚插画。我有机会与这个年龄已很大的弗兰克林长谈。他回忆起洛克威尔总是鼓励模特们对他的画作提供建议。

source: The SuperSix 's smooth , understated power is the result of Cannondale 's careful rider-focused design . Although the 2012 women 's model shares DNA with the frame ridden to multiple victories last year by Team Liquigas/Cannondale , the company insists that my version is no clone . True to its gender-specific product philosophy , Cannondale 's intention is to offer women " a unique geometry and thoughtful component choices , " says women 's product manager Lyriel Jordan .
domestication: Cannondale 的SuperSix有着非常平稳而不张扬的动力，这得益于他们对骑手需求的仔细研究和人性化设计。虽然2012款女士版的SuperSix与去年Team Liquigas/Cannondale队伍骑手们骑着取得多次胜利的自行车共享同一DNA，但Cannondale公司坚称我的这辆并不是简单的复制品。遵循他们针对女性的产品理念，Cannondale 女士产品经理Lyriel Jordan表示，他们旨在为女性提供“独特的车架几何形状和周到的零部件选择”。

source: It 's not easy being a progressive education reformer in the age of President Trump . Speaking for myself only , I support high-quality public charter schools but I oppose vouchers . And even progressive voucher supporters want choice accompanied by real accountability , which does not appear to be part of this administration 's agenda .
domestication: 在特朗普当总统的时代，要成为一名推进教育改革的人真是不容易。就我个人而言，我支持高质量的公立特许学校，但是我反对代金券。即使是那些主张代金券的进步派人士，也希望能在选择的同时有真正的责任感，这似乎并不是这届政府的政策内容。说白了，这届政府的政策似乎更倾向于放任自流。

source: I think that the hardest part of the transition , apart from loneliness and not being able to flit off on a whim , was adjusting to the short winter days . In the past , it had been so easy to flick a switch , but here we had no electricity . And when the days finally stretched and warmed , and I could peel off my winter clothes , I was attacked by every size and shape of insect imaginable . When it comes to wilderness living , if anything can knock someone from an idealist to a realist in 10 minutes flat , it is the bugs .
domestication: 我觉得除了寂寞和不能随心所欲之外，最难熬的就是适应短暂的冬日了。以前，只要一按开关就有电了，但这里可没有这么便利。一旦日子变长，天气变暖，我脱掉厚重的冬衣后，各种各样的虫子就像雪花片一样向我袭来。要说什么能让人迅速从理想主义者变成现实主义者，肯定是这些讨厌的虫子。它们足以在短短十分钟内让你对生活有全新的看法。
foreignization: 我认为除了孤独和不能随意出行以外，转变中最困难的部分是适应短暂的冬日。在过去，只需轻轻按一下开关就可以了，但是在这里，我们没有电。当那些日子终于延长并变暖时，我可以脱掉冬天的衣服，但是我遭到了各种各样大小和形状的昆虫的攻击。当谈到荒野生存时，如果有什么能在十分钟内将某人从理想主义者打击成现实主义者，那就是这些虫子。

When it comes to wilderness living , if anything can knock someone from an idealist to a realist in 10 minutes flat , it is the bugs .

source: Even though her life was quite different from her public school classmates ' , she never felt deprived , nor did she envy the more typical foods they ate while she drank soy milk and munched on carob bars . Her parents taught her food can be used as medicine to make your body well , or it can do some serious harm .

source: The ambulance business was n't even on Verrochi 's radar screen in the fall of 1991 , when he and Puopolo leased office space in Boston and cast about for a new consolidation candidate . When their banker suggested ambulances , Verrochi was intrigued . " I discovered there were 2,200 private companies in the field , mostly mom-and-pop operations , " he says . " Some had consolidated regionally , but nobody had gone public , and venture capitalists were nowhere in sight , so it had n't been picked over . It was undiscovered , which made it perfect for us . "
domestication: 1991年秋天，维罗奇和普波洛在波士顿租了办公室，开始寻找新的拓展机会。起初，救护车业务根本没入他们的法眼。直到银行家建议他们考虑救护车行业，维罗奇才萌生了兴趣。他发现整个行业有2200多家私营公司，大部分都是小型家庭式经营。虽然有一些已经在地区范围内完成了整合，但没有一家是公开上市公司，也没有风险投资的身影，所以整个行业基本上还未被人关注。这种状况让维罗奇觉得这是个千载难逢的好机会。
foreignization: 救护车业务在1991年秋季还没有出现在Verrochi的雷达屏幕上，当时他和Puopolo在波士顿租用办公空间，寻找新的整合候选者。当他们的银行家建议救护车业务时，Verrochi很感兴趣。“我发现这个行业有2200家私营公司，主要是夫妻店，”他说。“有些已经在地区范围内整合，但没有人公开上市，风险投资商也没有踪影，所以还没有被人关注过。它还未被发现，这使得它对我们来说是完美的。”

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

The ambulance business was n't even on Verrochi 's radar screen in the fall of 1991 , when he and Puopolo leased office space in Boston and cast about for a new consolidation candidate . When their banker suggested ambulances , Verrochi was intrigued . " I discovered there were 2,200 private companies in the field , mostly mom-and-pop operations , " he says . " Some had consolidated regionally , but nobody had gone public , and venture capitalists were nowhere in sight , so it had n't been picked over . It was undiscovered , which made it perfect for us . "

source: Lecount Davis , a certified financial planner and president of Washington , D.C.-based Financial Services Network , tells of a client whose wife left him with a mountain of bills . The small businessman could n't take care of personal and business bills , so he took to the shelter of the bankruptcy court .

source: As for sports , she says , " Recently when we telecast the World Soccer Cup matches live from Italy , in addition to our studio staff in Laguna Niguel , California , we had special reporters on the scene in Europe . Each telecast had an average audience rating of 38 . At times we reached peaks of 51 . If you consider that an audience rating of 51 represents 3,500,000 households , I do n't see how you can call that anything but success . "
domestication: 至于体育方面，她说：“我们最近在意大利直播世界杯比赛时，不仅在加州拉古纳尼格尔的演播室有工作人员，我们还派出了特派记者到欧洲现场进行报道。每场比赛的收视率平均都有38，最高峰值甚至达到了51。你想想吧，收视率达到51就意味着有350万户家庭在观看，如果这还不算成功，那什么才算呢？”
foreignization: 至于体育，她说，“最近我们从意大利直播世界杯比赛之时，除了我们在加利福尼亚州拉古纳尼格尔的演播室工作人员外，我们在欧洲还特别派遣了记者。每次直播都有平均38的收视率。有时我们达到了51的峰值。如果你认为51的收视率代表3,500,000个家庭，我不知道你怎么会叫那什么但成功。”

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

As for sports , she says , " Recently when we telecast the World Soccer Cup matches live from Italy , in addition to our studio staff in Laguna Niguel , California , we had special reporters on the scene in Europe . Each telecast had an average audience rating of 38 . At times we reached peaks of 51 . If you consider that an audience rating of 51 represents 3,500,000 households , I do n't see how you can call that anything but success . "
至于体育方面，她说：“我们最近在意大利直播世界杯比赛时，不仅在加州拉古纳尼格尔的演播室有工作人员，我们还派出了特派记者到欧洲现场进行报道。每场比赛的收视率平均都有38，最高峰值甚至达到了51。你想想吧，收视率达到51就意味着有350万户家庭在观看，如果这还不算成功，那什么才算呢？”

messages_foreignization.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

As for sports , she says , " Recently when we telecast the World Soccer Cup matches live from Italy , in addition to our studio staff in Laguna Niguel , California , we had special reporters on the scene in Europe . Each telecast had an average audience rating of 38 . At times we reached peaks of 51 . If you consider that an audience rating of 51 represents 3,500,000 households , I do n't see how you can call that anything but success . "
至于体育，她说，“最近我们从意大利直播世界杯比赛之时，除了我们在加利福尼亚州拉古纳尼格尔的演播室工作人员外，我们在欧洲还特别派遣了记者。每次直播都有平均38的收视率。有时我们达到了51的峰值。如果你认为51的收视率代表3,500,000个家庭，我不知道你怎么会叫那什么但成功。”

source: Unfortunately , we have quite different things on our minds when we talk with our representatives than when we shop for a new car . A " sensible " car that got fuel economy , was safe , had low emissions , and low operating costs would not compete well with the luxury or muscle cars . While sensible , it would be more expensive than the economy cars . The higher price tag would mean that some people could no longer afford the car . Insisting on safety and other socially desirable characteristics has the effect of denying cars to would-be purchasers with the lowest income .
domestication: 我们跟代表说话的时候，脑子里想的跟买新车的时候完全不是一回事儿。就算有一辆“很有道理”的车，油耗低、安全、排放少、使用成本低，也不会比那些豪华车或跑车更有竞争力。虽然这种车很合理，但是它的价格会比那些经济型车贵一点。更高的价格意味着有些人可能再也买不起车了。坚持安全性和其他社会上认为是理想的特点，实际上会让一些收入最低的人买不到车。这样说吧，到底是该穷人过日子还是要做好事呢？
foreignization: 不幸的是，当我们与我们的代表交谈时，我们的脑海里有完全不同的想法，而当我们购买一辆新车时却不是这样。一辆“明智”的汽车，具有燃油经济性、安全性、低排放和低运行成本，在与豪华车或肌肉车相比，并不能很好地竞争。虽然这种车很实用，但它的价格将高于普通的经济型汽车。更高的价格意味着有些人将无法承担得起这辆车。坚持安全性以及其他社会上理想的特点的结果，就是剥夺了那些收入最低的人们购买汽车的机会。

While sensible , it would be more expensive than the economy cars . The higher price tag would mean that some people could no longer afford the car . Insisting on safety and other socially desirable characteristics has the effect of denying cars to would-be purchasers with the lowest income .
我们跟代表说话的时候，脑子里想的跟买新车的时候完全不是一回事儿。就算有一辆“很有道理”的车，油耗低、安全、排放少、使用成本低，也不会比那些豪华车或跑车更有竞争力。虽然这种车很合理，但是它的价格会比那些经济型车贵一点。更高的价格意味着有些人可能再也买不起车了。坚持安全性和其他社会上认为是理想的特点，实际上会让一些收入最低的人买不到车。这样说吧，到底是该穷人过日子还是要做好事呢？

messages_foreignization.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Unfortunately , we have quite different things on our minds when we talk with our representatives than when we shop for a new car . A " sensible " car that got fuel economy , was safe , had low emissions , and low operating costs would not compete well with the luxury or muscle cars . While sensible , it would be more expensive than the economy cars . The higher price tag would mean that some people could no longer afford the car . Insisting on safety and other socially desirable characteristics has the effect of denying cars to would-be purchasers with the lowest income .
不幸的是，当我们与我们的代表交谈时，我们的脑海里有完全不同的想法，而当我们购买一辆新车时却不是这样。一辆“明智”的汽车，具有燃油经济性、安全性、低排放和低运行成本，在与豪华车或肌肉车相比，并不能很好地竞争。虽然这种车很实用，但它的价格将高于普通的经济型汽车。更高的价格意味着有些人将无法承担得起这辆车。坚持安全性以及其他社会上理想的特点的结果，就是剥夺了那些收入最低的人们购买汽车的机会。

source: The social-interest groups that backed the Republicans have also gotten a little of what they wanted . The Christian right did n't nail down school prayer , but it has won some anti-abortion legislation . The NRA got hearings on Waco to divert public attention after the Oklahoma City bombing spotlighted the NRA 's incendiary rhetoric . And the property rights organizations have been cheered by " takings " legislation that is really designed to help out the timber industry . Meanwhile , the House Republicans have spurned those individuals and movements that favored political reform -- that wanted to loosen the grip of the special interests . Term limits legislation , now a threat to Republican rule , was defeated in the House . Campaign finance reform has been repeatedly put off .
domestication: 那些支持共和党的社会团体也得到了他们想要的东西，虽然没完全按照他们的意愿。基督教右派没有推行学校祈祷，但他们成功推动了一些反堕胎立法。全国步枪协会（NRA）在俄克拉荷马城爆炸案之后，通过举行关于沃科围困事件的听证会来转移公众的注意力，而这次爆炸案正好揭露了NRA的煽动性言论。而房产权组织则对“征地”立法感到高兴，这实际上是为了帮助木材行业而设计的。与此同时，众议院共和党人却拒绝了那些主张政治改革的人和团体，他们原本希望能减轻特殊利益集团的控制。任期制立法，现在对共和党统治构成了威胁，在众议院被击败。竞选财务改革也一再被搁置。这些都说明，共和党的所谓改革，不过是为特殊利益集团服务的幌子罢了。
foreignization: 支持共和党的社会利益集团也获得了一些他们想要的东西。基督教右派没有实现在学校祈祷，但它已经获得了一些反堕胎立法。全国步枪协会在俄克拉荷马城爆炸案之后获得了关于韦科事件的听证会，以此来转移公众对全国步枪协会煽动性言论的注意力。而财产权组织则对“征用”立法感到高兴，这项立法实际上是为了帮助木材行业。与此同时，众议院共和党人却拒绝了那些倾向于政治改革的个人和运动——那些想要削弱特殊利益集团控制力的个人和运动。任期限制立法，如今对共和党统治构成了威胁，在众议院被击败。竞选财务改革也被一再拖延。

source: TIM PETERS , like Glenn Drowns , became a plant breeder in high school . Glenn , however , had the good fortune to start with a vegetable that is easy to work with . Tim began with broccoli , a plant breeder 's nightmare . And while Glenn seems to have been born a gardener , Tim had it thrust upon him .
domestication: 提姆·皮特斯就像格伦·德朗斯一样，在高中时期就开始学习植物育种。然而，格伦有幸从容易操作的蔬菜开始，而提姆却从难以对付的西兰花开始。看起来格伦似乎是天生就适合当园丁，而提姆却是被逼无奈地开始了这份工作。
foreignization: 蒂姆·皮特斯（Tim Peters），就像格伦·德劳恩斯（Glenn Drowns），在高中时就成了一名植物育种者。然而，格伦有幸从一开始就以一种容易处理的蔬菜开始。蒂姆开始是从花椰菜开始的，这是一种让植物育种者感到噩梦的植物。而当格伦似乎天生就是个园丁的时候，蒂姆却被迫去做这件事。

source: Holmes 's belief in society 's right to try out new forms of self-regulation followed from his belief , shared by all pragmatists , in the virtues of experimentation . If we learn by doing , we have to keep doing new things , since that is how knowledge progresses or at least adapts . This was the rationale for Holmes 's most celebrated opinion as a judge , his dissent in Abrams v. U.S. ( 1919 ) , in which he rejected state efforts to punish political opinion as a foreclosing of social possibilities . Even the Constitution , he said , " is an experiment , as all life is an experiment . Every year if not every day we have to wager our salvation upon some prophecy based upon imperfect knowledge . While that experiment is part of our system I think that we should be eternally vigilant against attempts to check the expression of opinions that we loathe and believe to be fraught with death . "
domestication: 霍姆斯相信社会有权尝试新的自我调节形式，这源于他与所有实用主义者共有的实验的美德信念。我们通过实践来学习，因此我们必须不断尝试新的事物，因为这就是知识进步和适应的途径。这是霍姆斯作为法官最著名的意见——他在阿布拉姆斯诉美国案（1919年）中的异议的依据，他在案中反对国家惩罚政治观点的行为，认为这种行为会关闭社会的可能。即使是宪法，他说，“也是一种实验，因为生命就是实验。每一年甚至每一天，我们都必须根据不完美的知识进行预言来博取我们的救赎。在这种实验成为我们制度的一部分时，我认为我们应该永远警惕那些企图扼杀我们憎恶和认为致命的意见表达的尝试。”
foreignization: 霍姆斯相信社会有权尝试新的自我调节形式，这源于他与所有实用主义者共同的信念，即实验的美德。如果我们通过实践来学习，我们必须继续尝试新事物，因为这就是知识进步或至少适应的途径。这是霍姆斯作为法官最著名的裁决理由，他在亚伯拉姆斯诉美国案（1919年）中的异议中，拒绝了国家对政治观点的惩罚，认为这会封闭社会可能性。他说，即使宪法，“也是一个实验，因为生命都是实验。每年如果不是每天，我们都不得不根据不完美的知识来预言我们的救赎。当这种实验成为我们制度的一部分时，我认为我们应该时刻警惕那些扼杀我们憎恶和相信充满死亡的意见表达的企图。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Holmes 's belief in society 's right to try out new forms of self-regulation followed from his belief , shared by all pragmatists , in the virtues of experimentation . If we learn by doing , we have to keep doing new things , since that is how knowledge progresses or at least adapts . This was the rationale for Holmes 's most celebrated opinion as a judge , his dissent in Abrams v. U.S. ( 1919 ) , in which he rejected state efforts to punish political opinion as a foreclosing of social possibilities . Even the Constitution , he said , " is an experiment , as all life is an experiment . Every year if not every day we have to wager our salvation upon some prophecy based upon imperfect knowledge . While that experiment is part of our system I think that we should be eternally vigilant against attempts to check the expression of opinions that we loathe and believe to be fraught with death . "

霍姆斯相信社会有权尝试新的自我调节形式，这源于他与所有实用主义者共有的实验的美德信念。我们通过实践来学习，因此我们必须不断尝试新的事物，因为这就是知识进步和适应的途径。这是霍姆斯作为法官最著名的意见——他在阿布拉姆斯诉美国案（1919年）中的异议的依据，他在案中反对国家惩罚政治观点的行为，认为这种行为会关闭社会的可能。即使是宪法，他说，“也是一种实验，因为生命就是实验。每一年甚至每一天，我们都必须根据不完美的知识进行预言来博取我们的救赎。在这种实验成为我们制度的一部分时，我认为我们应该永远警惕那些企图扼杀我们憎恶和认为致命的意见表达的尝试。”

messages_foreignization.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Holmes 's belief in society 's right to try out new forms of self-regulation followed from his belief , shared by all pragmatists , in the virtues of experimentation . If we learn by doing , we have to keep doing new things , since that is how knowledge progresses or at least adapts . This was the rationale for Holmes 's most celebrated opinion as a judge , his dissent in Abrams v. U.S. ( 1919 ) , in which he rejected state efforts to punish political opinion as a foreclosing of social possibilities . Even the Constitution , he said , " is an experiment , as all life is an experiment . Every year if not every day we have to wager our salvation upon some prophecy based upon imperfect knowledge . While that experiment is part of our system I think that we should be eternally vigilant against attempts to check the expression of opinions that we loathe and believe to be fraught with death . "

霍姆斯相信社会有权尝试新的自我调节形式，这源于他与所有实用主义者共同的信念，即实验的美德。如果我们通过实践来学习，我们必须继续尝试新事物，因为这就是知识进步或至少适应的途径。这是霍姆斯作为法官最著名的裁决理由，他在亚伯拉姆斯诉美国案（1919年）中的异议中，拒绝了国家对政治观点的惩罚，认为这会封闭社会可能性。他说，即使宪法，“也是一个实验，因为生命都是实验。每年如果不是每天，我们都不得不根据不完美的知识来预言我们的救赎。当这种实验成为我们制度的一部分时，我认为我们应该时刻警惕那些扼杀我们憎恶和相信充满死亡的意见表达的企图。

source: James : And that way ... madness lies , I guess is the blunt way to put that . But absolutely -- this is a conflict that is less about immediate sparks flying and more how it 's a powder keg that 's been conveniently placed around other sparks for now . Could it blow up in Sansa , Dany , and everyone else 's faces ? Could the sparks fly elsewhere ? We 'll have to wait and see . But as the season continues , I 'm very interested to see these two characters come together more directly .
domestication: 詹姆斯说：这样下去就是一团糟，这是直截了当的说法。但是毫无疑问——这是一场冲突，不是马上就要爆发的火花，而是一颗随时可能被点燃的炸药桶，只是暂时被安置在其他火花旁边。会不会突然爆炸，让珊莎、丹妮和所有人都措手不及？火花会不会飞到别处去？我们拭目以待。但随着季节的继续，我很感兴趣地想看到这两个人物直接碰撞在一起。

source: But Trump did n't want Grady ; he wanted Kevin McAleenan , commissioner of Customs and Border Protection . It 's easy to see why . Under McAleenan 's leadership , CBP repeatedly broke the law to implement Trump 's first travel ban , earning a rebuke from DHS ' Office of Inspector General . McAleenan is a strong proponent of a border wall as well as new laws to curb asylum-seekers ' entry into the country . He infamously failed to inform Congress that a 7-year-old girl died in CBP custody when he testified before the Senate just three days after her death .
domestication: 但是特朗普不想要格雷迪，而是想要美国海关和边境保护局（CBP）的专员凯文·麦克阿利南。很容易理解为什么。 在麦克阿利南的领导下，海关和边境保护局一次又一次地违法实施特朗普的第一份旅行禁令，遭到了国土安全部办公室的申斥。麦克阿利南也是修建边境墙的坚定支持者，并主张制定新的法律以限制寻求庇护者进入该国。他在一个7岁的小女孩死于海关和边境保护局的羁押期间三天后，就在参议院作证时，没有通知国会关于这件事，令人震惊。 这说明他对移民问题采取非常强硬的态度。
foreignization: 但特朗普不想要格雷迪，而是想要美国海关和边境保护局（Customs and Border Protection）的专员凯文·麦克阿利南（Kevin McAleenan）。很容易理解为什么。 在麦克阿利南的领导下，CBP一再违法实施特朗普的第一项旅行禁令，遭到了国土安全部（DHS）审计长办公室的批评。 麦克阿利南是边境墙的坚定支持者，也主张制定新法律限制寻求庇护者进入该国。他在参议院作证时，只是在一名7岁女孩死于CBP羁押三天后，就未向国会通报此事而声名狼藉。

Under McAleenan 's leadership , CBP repeatedly broke the law to implement Trump 's first travel ban , earning a rebuke from DHS ' Office of Inspector General . McAleenan is a strong proponent of a border wall as well as new laws to curb asylum-seekers ' entry into the country . He infamously failed to inform Congress that a 7-year-old girl died in CBP custody when he testified before the Senate just three days after her death .

source: Shelby Tilford , director of NASAs earth sciences division , says a French-Russian satellite scheduled for launch this year or next will carry an instrument capable of monitoring variations in solar brightness . But it is not clear how well this instrument will work or whether the satellite will last beyond a few years . Because of funding limitations , the United States has no plans for launching any such instrument in the 1990s . According to Tilford , " There is a good possibility that there will be a data gap in solar measurements . But that is only one of many data gaps . "
domestication: 美国国家航空航天局地球科学部主任雪莉·蒂尔福德说，今年或明年将发射的一颗法俄卫星上将搭载一个能监测太阳光照变化的仪器。但是，这个仪器能不能用以及卫星能不能使用超过几年都还不清楚。由于资金有限，美国在90年代不会发射任何这样的仪器。蒂尔福德说：“太阳观测数据可能会有空白，但这只是众多数据空白之一。”

source: You 've been more patient than most people would have been in your situation . Your wife 's initial reason to go back to her home country was a legitimate one , but to stay there in order to start dental school seems cruel and unusual . It must have been difficult to comprehend how the same woman you married could be so callous as to leave you after two days and only come back for three-week vacations at a time . It 's not clear whether she married you for love , money or a Green Card . You need to consult a divorce lawyer , but I have a hunch that she will be out of luck on all three .
domestication: 你比大多数人在这种情况下更有耐心。你妻子最初回国的原因是合理的，但为了上牙科学校而留在那里，这似乎很残忍和不寻常。很难理解你娶的女人怎么会这么无情，两天后就离开你，只隔几周回来小住一段时间。不知道她嫁给你是出于爱、钱还是绿卡。不管怎样，你需要咨询离婚律师，但是我感觉她三者都不会如意。

source: The U.S. health care system is often criticized as wasteful because many procedures are " unnecessary . " One source of evidence for unnecessary medical care is a series of studies that show wide variations in the rate of treatment among different U.S. communities , with no apparent justification . One might suppose that in countries where health care is rationed and many medical needs are unmet , doctors would tend to provide only necessary care . That is not the case . Treatment rates in Canada also vary considerably . For example : There is a four-to-one difference among Canadian counties in the rate of cesarean sections . There is a four-to-one difference in rates of tonsillectomy and hysterectomy and a two-to-one difference in the rates of mastectomy , prostatectomy , and cholecystectomy .
domestication: 美国的医疗体系常常被批评为浪费，因为很多医疗程序是不必要的。有一系列研究显示，美国不同地区的治疗率有很大差异，而这些差异并没有明显的理由。人们可能会认为，在医疗资源紧张、许多医疗需求得不到满足的国家，医生只会提供必要的医疗服务。但事实并非如此。在加拿大，治疗率也存在很大差异。例如，加拿大各县剖腹产的发生率相差四倍，扁桃体切除术和子宫切除术的发生率也相差四倍，乳房切除术、前列腺切除术和胆囊切除术的发生率相差两倍。这种情况让人觉得，医疗资源的分配似乎并不完全基于患者的实际需求，而是受到其他因素的影响。这就引发了一个问题：如何才能确保医疗资源得到合理分配，避免不必要的医疗程序？

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

The U.S. health care system is often criticized as wasteful because many procedures are " unnecessary . " One source of evidence for unnecessary medical care is a series of studies that show wide variations in the rate of treatment among different U.S. communities , with no apparent justification . One might suppose that in countries where health care is rationed and many medical needs are unmet , doctors would tend to provide only necessary care . That is not the case . Treatment rates in Canada also vary considerably . For example : There is a four-to-one difference among Canadian counties in the rate of cesarean sections . There is a four-to-one difference in rates of tonsillectomy and hysterectomy and a two-to-one difference in the rates of mastectomy , prostatectomy , and cholecystectomy .

source: Music played before battle varied , and it often reflected a preferred style of fighting . Martial songs from the era of Prussian ruler Frederick the Great , circa 1 760 , were stately and imposing , with flutes , strings , and an occasional horn . Listen , and you can picture the rigid , slow , and disciplined infantry tactics of that time .
domestication: 战争前的音乐各式各样，它往往反映了军队偏爱的战法。来自普鲁士国王弗雷德里克大帝时代的战歌，大约在1760年前后流行，非常威严庄重，伴有长笛、弦乐和偶尔响起的号角声。仔细聆听，你几乎可以想象出当时僵硬、缓慢而又纪律严明的步兵战术。这种音乐让人联想到古代战场上的盛况，仿佛穿越回到了那个时代。
foreignization: 战斗前的音乐各不相同，并且它往往反映了人们偏爱的战斗风格。在弗雷德里克大帝统治时期，大约1760年，军事歌曲是庄严而宏伟的，有长笛、弦乐和偶尔的号角。听着，你可以想象出那时候僵硬、缓慢、有纪律的步兵战术。

source: Some business spending canceled itself out . Since businesses often lobby against each other -- AT &T,; for instance , against the Baby Bells -- business contributions did n't necessarily guarantee a clear outcome and have even provided an opportunity for other organizations to hold the balance of power . But corporate lobbying and campaign contributions have guaranteed that , on issues that clearly divide business from consumers or labor , business would prevail . That first became apparent in the Carter administration when the AFL-CIO lost on labor law reform , consumer groups lost on their plan for an Office of Consumer Representation , and business succeeded in transforming Carter 's progressive tax reform plan into a capital gains tax cut for business and the wealthy .
domestication: 企业间的竞争使得一些商业支出相互抵消，因为各大公司之间经常存在着相互对立的利益。比如说AT&T公司可能会游说反对小型电信运营商Baby Bells。这意味着企业的政治捐款不一定能保证他们的胜利，甚至还会让其他组织有机会掌握权力平衡。然而，当涉及到企业和消费者或劳工明显对立的问题时，企业游说和竞选捐款可以确保企业的胜利。这种情况首先在卡特政府时期变得明显，当时劳联失去了关于劳动法改革的斗争，消费者团体也未能建立消费者代表办公室，而企业成功地将卡特的进步税改革计划转变为对企业和富人的资本利得税减免。
foreignization: 一些商业支出相互抵消，因为企业通常会相互游说——例如AT&T反对婴儿贝尔公司（Baby Bells）——因此，商业捐款不一定能保证明确的结果，甚至为其他组织提供了掌握权力的机会。但是，企业游说和竞选捐款已经保证，在企业与消费者或劳工明显对立的问题上，企业将占据主导地位。这首先在卡特政府时期变得明显，当时美国劳工联合会（AFL-CIO）在劳动法改革上失败，消费者团体在消费者代表办公室计划上失败，而企业成功地将卡特的进步税改计划转变为企业和富人的资本利得税削减。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Some business spending canceled itself out . Since businesses often lobby against each other -- AT &T,; for instance , against the Baby Bells -- business contributions did n't necessarily guarantee a clear outcome and have even provided an opportunity for other organizations to hold the balance of power . But corporate lobbying and campaign contributions have guaranteed that , on issues that clearly divide business from consumers or labor , business would prevail . That first became apparent in the Carter administration when the AFL-CIO lost on labor law reform , consumer groups lost on their plan for an Office of Consumer Representation , and business succeeded in transforming Carter 's progressive tax reform plan into a capital gains tax cut for business and the wealthy .

source: We know the names of all but three of those who signed on for the epochal trip . They came primarily from towns and villages in Andalusia ; all but four were Spaniards . Columbus was , of course , one of the foreigners . Each ship had a master , a captain , a pilot , a marshal , and a surgeon , supported by the usual complement of able seamen and cabin boys .
domestication: 这次远征的参与者我们都知道了，只有三个是不知道名字的。他们大部分来自安达卢西亚的城镇和村庄，除了四个人，其余都是西班牙人。当然，哥伦布就是其中一个外国人。每艘船都有一个船长，一个队长，一个领航员，一个警官和一个医生，还有足够的水手和童工。

source: Mark Minasi is an owner of Moulton , Minasi , &; Company , an Arlington , Virginia-based firm specializing in training technical and nontechnical users how to support , upgrade . and repair their PCs . He is also the author of COMPUTE 'S recently published Maintaining , Upgrading , and Troubleshooting IBM PCs , Compatibles , and PS/2 Personal Computers . Some of the illustrations used in this feature were done by Terry Keaton , an associate with Moulton , Minasi , &; Company .

source: By mixing and matching components , Felt delivers a performance road package on this aluminum frame and carbon fork . A BB30 bottom bracket , replaceable derailleur hanger and external cable routing make the F75 an able workhorse , capable of high performance and tough enough to survive a few scrapes. -A.J.B .

foreignization: 通过混合搭配组件，Felt在这个铝合金车架和碳纤维前叉上提供了性能型公路套件。BB30底座、可更换的变速器挂钩和外置电缆导线使得F75成为一个合格的工作马，能够实现高性能，并足够坚韧以承受一些擦撞。-A.J.B.

source: Compassion meditation slows things down so people can practice being more calm , notice the feelings that arise and learn to be less reactive , she adds . " This gives you more mental space to focus on the other person , to practice wishing kindness and wanting them to be well , and I think both parts are really important for effectively responding to people suffering . "
domestication: 慈悲冥想可以让人慢下来，从而更加冷静地观察自己的情绪，学会减少冲动的反应。她说，这样做可以让你拥有更多的精神空间来关注他人，练习仁慈之心，希望他们安好。而我认为，两者对于有效应对苦难都是非常重要的。
foreignization: 慈悲冥想使事物变慢，让人们可以练习更加平静，注意产生的感受，并学会变得不那么容易反应，她补充道。“这给你更多的心理空间来关注其他人，练习希望仁慈和渴望他们过得好，我认为这两部分对于有效地回应受苦的人都非常重要。”

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Compassion meditation slows things down so people can practice being more calm , notice the feelings that arise and learn to be less reactive , she adds . " This gives you more mental space to focus on the other person , to practice wishing kindness and wanting them to be well , and I think both parts are really important for effectively responding to people suffering . "
慈悲冥想可以让人慢下来，从而更加冷静地观察自己的情绪，学会减少冲动的反应。她说，这样做可以让你拥有更多的精神空间来关注他人，练习仁慈之心，希望他们安好。而我认为，两者对于有效应对苦难都是非常重要的。

Compassion meditation slows things down so people can practice being more calm , notice the feelings that arise and learn to be less reactive , she adds . " This gives you more mental space to focus on the other person , to practice wishing kindness and wanting them to be well , and I think both parts are really important for effectively responding to people suffering . "
慈悲冥想使事物变慢，让人们可以练习更加平静，注意产生的感受，并学会变得不那么容易反应，她补充道。“这给你更多的心理空间来关注其他人，练习希望仁慈和渴望他们过得好，我认为这两部分对于有效地回应受苦的人都非常重要。”

source: Rival claims follow in the wake of any heroic accomplishment . Columbus was born in Genoa of Italian parents in 1451 , and it has been insisted that he was a full-blooded Spaniard , a Catalan , or a Jew of Portuguese or Catalan descent , but the evidence suggests that he was a Catholic of Genoese origin . Whatever his background , he basked in that wondrous confluence of Arab , Jewish , and Christian genius that marked the intellectual world of Portugal and Spain during the early Renaissance . The undisputed facts are that his father was Domenico Colombo , and his mother was Susanna Fontanarossa , both of Genoa . They had two younger sons , Bartolomeo and Giacomo ( later known as Diego ) , and a daughter , Bianchinetta . The family business was weaving . Domenico managed a decent living as a member of the clothiers ' guild , but his prospects for improvement were never very bright .
domestication: 任何英雄事迹之后都会引来一片争议。哥伦布出生在1451年的意大利热那亚，人们纷纷议论他到底是不是纯粹的西班牙人，是加泰罗尼亚人，还是葡萄牙或者加泰罗尼亚的犹太人。然而，证据表明，他很可能是一个真正的天主教徒，血统上是热那亚人。无论他的背景如何，他都沐浴在阿拉伯人、犹太人和基督徒的卓越智慧之中，这种智慧在早期文艺复兴时期的葡萄牙和西班牙知识界非常常见。毫无疑问，他的父亲叫多梅尼科·哥伦布（Domenico Colombo），母亲叫苏珊娜·丰塔纳罗莎（Susanna Fontanarossa），两个人都是热那亚人。他们有两个小儿子，巴托洛梅奥（Bartolomeo）和贾科莫（后来被称为迭戈），还有一个女儿比安基内塔（Bianchinetta）。当时，全家人的生计都依赖于织布业。作为一个织工公会的成员，多梅尼科勉强维持着一家人的生活，但前途并不是特别光明。

source: Tod Hamilton ! might not have set Hollywood on fire , but Duhamel made the most of his marquee moment and showed he was more than just a set of dimples . It 's that old career chestnut : " You want a big title and bigger responsibility , even if it 's in a smatter pond , " McIntyre says . " It 's easier for an employer to trust you in a Leading rote if you 've already shown you can hack it . " DENNY WATKINS
domestication: 杜汉梅尔也许没能在好莱坞掀起波澜，但他还是充分利用了自己出演的机会，向大家证明自己不仅仅是一个有着迷人酒窝的帅哥。就像那句老话说的，“你想要更重要的职位和更大的责任，即使这是在一个较小的池塘里”，麦金泰尔说，“如果你已经证明自己能够胜任某个角色，那么雇主更容易信任你。”这句话形象地说明了杜汉梅尔的处境。
foreignization: Tod Hamilton！也许没有激起好莱坞的热潮，但是Duhamel充分利用了他的全明星时刻，并且表现出他不仅仅是一个有酒窝的人。这是老掉牙的职业道理：“你想要一个重要的职位和更大的责任，即使是在一个小池塘里，”麦金太尔说。“如果你已经证明你可以应对自如，那么对于雇主来说，很容易相信你能够胜任主要角色。” DENNY WATKINS

source: One mother who 'd been compiling a list of the half-siblings of her own baby by Raul 's sperm wrote on Cryobank 's bulletin board that she had already found 22 " success stories " by networking online . When I e-mailed her , she replied , " I am not comfortable disclosing the exact number of siblings , but I will say there are more than I had initially hoped . "
domestication: 一位母亲，她的宝宝是通过拉尔的精子受精的，她在为自己的宝宝寻找同父异母的兄弟姐妹时，在冷冻银行的公告板上写道，她已经通过在线社交找到了22个“成功故事”。我给她发邮件后，她回复说：“我不太想透露确切的兄弟姐妹数量，但是可以说比我最初希望的要多。”这位妈妈的回答很有意思，既没有直接回答问题，又给出了一个模糊的答案，透露出了一定的信息。

source: Additionally , many low-wageworkers at the chain were subject to excruciating working conditions as a result of the increased demand . Some workers put in 60-hour weeks to meet demand ; another told Vox that she worked a 12-hour shift until her legs went numb . One photo of a dejected-looking Popeyes employee sitting outside the store even went viral , receiving the full meme treatment ( though many later correctly pointed out that exploiting an exhausted worker for the amusement of the Twitter masses was perhaps not the most sensitive response . ) Such stories should n't just serve as grist for the viral news mill ; they should serve as testament to the damage wrought by a capitalism system fueled by incessant demand and an obsessive focus on the bottom line , and should be read accordingly .
domestication: 此外，连锁店的许多低薪工人由于需求激增而遭受了艰难的工作条件。有些工人每周工作60个小时来满足需求；另一个工人告诉Vox，她工作了12个小时，直到她的腿麻木。有一张泼尼斯餐厅一名失望的员工坐在店外的照片甚至在网上疯传，引发了大量的表情包（尽管很多人后来正确指出，利用一个筋疲力尽的工人的图像来娱乐推特上的大众可能不是最敏感的回应）。这些故事不应该仅仅作为网络热点新闻的素材；它们应该作为见证资本主义制度的弊端，即该制度由无休止的需求和对利润的执着驱动，并且应该被这样看待。换句话说，这些故事揭露了资本主义制度的阴暗面，人们应该以此为鉴。
foreignization: 此外，许多连锁店的低薪工人由于需求增加而面临艰苦的工作条件。有些工人每周工作60小时以满足需求；另一个工人告诉Vox，她工作了12个小时直到腿部麻木。甚至有一张教皇餐厅一名精神萎靡的员工坐在商店外的照片在网上疯传，收到了充分的表情包化处理（尽管很多人后来正确地指出，利用一名筋疲力尽的工人的劳累来娱乐Twitter上的大众可能不是最敏感的反应）。这样的故事不应该仅仅作为病毒式新闻的素材；它们应该作为见证资本主义制度所造成的破坏，这种制度是由不断的需求和对利润的痴迷所驱动的，并且应该被这样阅读。

Translate the following text to Chinese.

Additionally , many low-wageworkers at the chain were subject to excruciating working conditions as a result of the increased demand . Some workers put in 60-hour weeks to meet demand ; another told Vox that she worked a 12-hour shift until her legs went numb . One photo of a dejected-looking Popeyes employee sitting outside the store even went viral , receiving the full meme treatment ( though many later correctly pointed out that exploiting an exhausted worker for the amusement of the Twitter masses was perhaps not the most sensitive response . ) Such stories should n't just serve as grist for the viral news mill ; they should serve as testament to the damage wrought by a capitalism system fueled by incessant demand and an obsessive focus on the bottom line , and should be read accordingly .

source: Scandals unrelated to such major themes are unlikely to go anywhere in election years , as I learned firsthand many years ago . When Bill Clinton was running for reelection in 1996 , I was a regular visitor to Dick Morris 's suite at the Jefferson Hotel . Morris was then a shadowy figure who almost never talked to the press . ( When I interviewed him and his sidekick , Mark Penn , I had no idea that a few weeks later a supermarket tabloid would reveal that Morris was getting his toes sucked in the suite by a prostitute . ) At the time , Morris 's client , Clinton , was the subject of daily scandal stories about secret Asian fund-raising . Morris waved off the stories , explaining that only a mammoth scandal like Watergate eveT has any actual influence over voters . That 's especially true in a bad economy .
domestication: 与大选主题无关的丑闻，在选举年里不太可能有任何进展，我很多年前就深有体会。当比尔·克林顿在1996年竞选连任时，我经常去杰斐逊酒店拜访迪克·莫里斯的套房。莫里斯当时是一个神秘的人物，几乎从不接受媒体采访。（我采访他和他的助手马克·佩恩时，还不知道几周后一家超市小报会爆料，称莫里斯在套房里被一个妓女吸脚。）当时，莫里斯的客户克林顿每天都在面临有关秘密亚裔筹款的丑闻报道。莫里斯轻描淡写地说，只有像水门事件那样的大丑闻才真正能影响选民的投票选择，尤其是在经济不好的情况下。
foreignization: 与这些主要主题无关的丑闻不太可能在选举年取得进展，正如我多年前亲身经历的那样。当比尔·克林顿在 1996 年竞选连任时，我是杰斐逊酒店迪克·莫里斯套房的常客。莫里斯当时是一个几乎从不对媒体说话的神秘人物。（当我采访他和他的副手马克·彭恩时，我不知道几周后一家超市小报会披露莫里斯在套房里被一个妓女吸脚。）当时，莫里斯的客户克林顿是关于秘密亚洲筹款的每日丑闻故事的主角。莫里斯轻描淡写了这些故事，解释说只有像水门事件这样的巨大丑闻才真正能影响选民。特别是在经济不景气的时候。

Translate the following text to Chinese.

Scandals unrelated to such major themes are unlikely to go anywhere in election years , as I learned firsthand many years ago . When Bill Clinton was running for reelection in 1996 , I was a regular visitor to Dick Morris 's suite at the Jefferson Hotel . Morris was then a shadowy figure who almost never talked to the press . ( When I interviewed him and his sidekick , Mark Penn , I had no idea that a few weeks later a supermarket tabloid would reveal that Morris was getting his toes sucked in the suite by a prostitute . ) At the time , Morris 's client , Clinton , was the subject of daily scandal stories about secret Asian fund-raising . Morris waved off the stories , explaining that only a mammoth scandal like Watergate eveT has any actual influence over voters . That 's especially true in a bad economy .

与大选主题无关的丑闻，在选举年里不太可能有任何进展，我很多年前就深有体会。当比尔·克林顿在1996年竞选连任时，我经常去杰斐逊酒店拜访迪克·莫里斯的套房。莫里斯当时是一个神秘的人物，几乎从不接受媒体采访。（我采访他和他的助手马克·佩恩时，还不知道几周后一家超市小报会爆料，称莫里斯在套房里被一个妓女吸脚。）当时，莫里斯的客户克林顿每天都在面临有关秘密亚裔筹款的丑闻报道。莫里斯轻描淡写地说，只有像水门事件那样的大丑闻才真正能影响选民的投票选择，尤其是在经济不好的情况下。

source: The mystery bookstore is largely a phenomenon of the last decade . Booksellers in general are a dedicated bunch , and the proprietors of stores dealing exclusively in mysteries would not be in the field if they did not love it . Their shops often have the ambience of clubhouses , and many of their customers drop in as much to chat as to buy books . Murder Ink , Grounds for Murder , Sherlock 's Home , Rue Morgue , Footprints of a Gigantic Hound , Booked for Murder , Foul Play , The Butler Did it , Murder Undercover , Once Upon a Crime , Murder for Pleasure , Scene of the Crime-the ingenuity displayed in the stores ' names suggests the resourcefulness of the people who operate them .
domestication: 神秘书店基本上是近十年来的一个现象。总体来说，书商是一群专心致志的人，而只经营悬疑小说的店主如果不热爱这一行，不会从事这份工作。他们的店铺常常有着俱乐部的氛围，很多顾客光临不仅是为了买书，也是为了聊天。诸如“谋杀印记”、“谋杀动机”、“夏洛克之家”、“尸场”、“巨大猎犬的足迹”、“被列入谋杀名单”、“不公平游戏”、“是管家干的”、“隐蔽的谋杀”、“曾经有个罪案”、“为乐而谋杀”、“犯罪现场”等书店名字上的巧思，体现了经营者们的机智和耐人寻味的性格。
foreignization: 神秘书店在很大程度上是过去十年来的现象。总体来说，书商是一群敬业的人，而只经营悬疑类书籍的商店老板如果不热爱这一领域的话就不会从事这行。他们的店铺通常具有俱乐部的氛围，许多顾客光临店铺时与其说是来买书，不如说是来聊天。Murder Ink、Grounds for Murder、Sherlock's Home、Rue Morgue、Footprints of a Gigantic Hound、Booked for Murder、Foul Play、The Butler Did it、Murder Undercover、Once Upon a Crime、Murder for Pleasure、Scene of the Crime——这些店铺名称所展示的机智，表明经营这些店铺的人们非常有创造力。

source: 1 . ESPN 's MLB broadcast from Cuba on Wednesday afternoon -- the network is airing an exhibition game at 1:30 p.m . ET between the Tampa Bay Rays and the Cuban National Team from Estadio Latinoamericano in Havana -- is a personal one for Eduardo Perez . The ESPN MLB analyst is the son of Hall of Famer Tony Perez , who was born in Ciego de ? vila , Cuba and was signed to a pro contract in 1960 at age 17 by a Reds scout while playing on a sugar factory team . It 's been 25 years since Eduardo , now 46 , has been to Cuba to see his extended family . He will serve as the game 's analyst on alongside play by play announcer Karl Ravech and fellow analyst Doug Glanville . ESPN reporter Pedro Gomez , who is the son of Cuban refugees , will provide reports , as will ESPN MLB Insider Tim Kurkjian .
domestication: ESPN 周三下午从古巴直播了一场MLB比赛，这对埃杜亚多·佩雷斯来说是非常有意义的一刻。 当天，ESPN 将在美国东部时间下午1点30分直播坦帕湾光芒队和古巴国家队之间的友谊赛，这场比赛将在哈瓦那的拉丁美洲体育场举行。埃杜亚多·佩雷斯是ESPN 的MLB分析师，他的父亲托尼·佩雷斯是一位名人堂成员，出生在古巴的西耶戈德阿维拉，17岁时就被辛辛那提红人队的一名球探签下，之前他曾在一家糖厂的球队打球。埃杜亚多已经25年没去过古巴看望他的远亲了。这次，他将与解说员卡尔·雷维奇和分析师道格·格兰维尔一起担任比赛的分析师。 ESPN记者佩德罗·戈麦斯是古巴难民的儿子，他将会提供赛场报道，ESPN 的MLB 内幕消息人士蒂姆·库克吉安也会提供报道。埃杜亚多·佩雷斯现在46岁了，他终于又有机会回到故乡，看望远亲，真是感慨万千。
foreignization: ESPN 星期三下午从古巴进行的MLB转播，对于Eduardo Perez来说具有个人意义--该网络将在东部时间下午1点30分从哈瓦那的拉丁美洲体育场直播坦帕湾光芒队与古巴国家队之间的一场表演赛。ESPN的MLB分析师埃杜阿多·佩雷斯是名人堂成员托尼·佩雷斯的儿子，托尼·佩雷斯出生于西耶戈德阿维拉，古巴，17岁时被红人队的球探签下，当时他在糖厂队打球。自从现在46岁的埃杜阿多上一次去古巴看望他的大家庭已经过去了25年。他将与实况播音员卡尔·拉维奇和同为分析师的道格·格兰维尔一起担任比赛的分析师。ESPN记者佩德罗·戈麦斯是古巴难民的儿子，将提供报道，ESPN的MLB内部人士蒂姆·库尔克吉安也会提供报道。

source: Stark : There are n't as many choices as you 'd think . Very few players in this sport are what I 'd describe as difficult or unpleasant to interview . But who 's the toughest ? I 'd vote for Yasiel Puig . Part of this is cultural , I 'm sure . But he 's always struck me as a guy who has no understanding of what we do and regards the media as not much more than a nuisance . Of course , where he came from , there was no equivalent to the American sports media and no requirement for any player to speak with the media . So I get it . But that does n't make him any easier to deal with .  How would you define the access you receive from MLB teams on a day-to-day basis during the regular season ?
domestication: 说到和运动员打交道，你会以为选择很多，但实际上并没有那么多。这个运动中很少有难缠或令人头疼的选手。但如果让我选最难对付的，那我一定会投票给Yasiel Puig。有一部分原因是文化上的，我相信。他总给我一种感觉，就是他根本不懂我们做什么，还把媒体当成麻烦事一样看待。在他来的那个地方，没有类似美国体育媒体的东西，也不需要运动员接受采访，所以我能理解。但这并不意味着他好对付。那么，在常规赛期间，MLB球队日常给你的报道权限如何呢？
foreignization: 斯塔克：可供选择的并没有你想象中那么多。在这个运动项目中，很少有我会形容为难以应对或不愉快采访的球员。但是谁是最难对付的呢？我会投票给亚西尔·普伊格。这其中有一部分原因是文化上的，我相信。他总是给我一种印象，这家伙根本不懂我们所做的事情，并且把媒体看作不仅仅是一个麻烦。当然，在他来自的地方，没有美国体育媒体的同等对应物，也不需要任何球员与媒体交谈。所以我可以理解这一点。但这并不使他更容易应对。你如何定义你在常规赛期间每天从MLB球队获得的机会？

Of course , where he came from , there was no equivalent to the American sports media and no requirement for any player to speak with the media . So I get it . But that does n't make him any easier to deal with .  How would you define the access you receive from MLB teams on a day-to-day basis during the regular season ?

source: In 1986 Pilgrim 's Pride was enjoying its best year to date : It earned $19 million on $375 million in sales . But Pilgrim knew the prosperity would be transitory , because the company was almost entirely dependent on highly cyclical commodity chicken sales . Twice over the years , commodity chicken downcycles had almost bankrupted Pilgrim 's Pride .
domestication: 1986年，是普利茅斯自豪的最佳时期：他们的销售额高达3.75亿美元，盈利1900万美元。但是，普利茅斯知道这种好日子不会长久，因为他们的生意几乎完全依赖周期性商品鸡的销售。以前，两次鸡肉市场的低迷曾差点让公司破产。这种生意就像坐过山车，忽高忽低，风险很大。所以，即使赚了钱，普利茅斯也不能高枕无忧。
foreignization: 1986 年，Pilgrim's Pride 正处于其历史上最好的年份：它从 3.75 亿美元的销售额中获得了 1,900 万美元的利润。但是 Pilgrim 知道这种繁荣是短暂的，因为该公司几乎完全依赖于周期性很强的商品鸡肉销售。在过去的几年里，商品鸡肉市场两次下滑几乎使 Pilgrim's Pride 破产。

source: " Many of my paintings include a narrative that has symbolic elements in it , " he adds . " Often , they reflect my interest in history . I also like what I call anticipatory paintings , ' works that capture a moment in which something is about to happen , such as Honey , I 'm Home , " he says . " The presence of light in the work is meaningful to me in a spiritual sense ; I prefer to have natural light coming in from somewhere . "

source: Common water hemp has risen to become one of the most serious weeds in Midwestern corn and soy . In a study also appearing in the June 8 Journal of Agricultural and Food Chemistry , Tranel 's team reports finding water hemp simultaneously immune to as many as four functional classes of herbicides - including glyphosate 's class . In the March Pest Management Science , the team reported water hemp 's resistance to yet a fifth herbicide group .
domestication: 杂草之中，普通菊麻是一种最具威胁的草害，它已经在美国中西部地区的大豆和玉米地里泛滥成灾。最近发表在6月8日的《农业与食品化学杂志》上的一项研究显示，伊利诺伊大学的特雷尔博士的团队发现这种杂草已经对多达四种不同类型的除草剂产生了抗药性，其中就包括目前广泛使用的草甘膦。而早在三月份的《害虫管理科学》杂志上，这个团队就曾经报道过这种杂草对第五类除草剂的抗药性。

source: Just how bad is the problem ? Examples of digital things lost forever abound , some personal in scale , some global . Software patents that can be infringed freely because the original software no longer works , preventing the patent holders from proving prior art . Land use and natural-resource inventories for the State of New York compiled in the late 1960s that ca n't be accessed because the customized software needed to open the files no longer exists . NASA satellite data from the 1970s that might have helped us understand global warming , were they not unreadable today .
domestication: 问题到底有多严重？被永远丢失的数字东西的例子比比皆是，无论是个人还是全球范围的。有些软件专利可以肆无忌惮地被侵犯，因为原始软件已经不能使用了，这样一来，专利持有者就无法证明先前的创造。还有纽约州在 60 年代末编制的土地利用和自然资源清单，因所需的定制软件已经不存在而无法访问。70 年代的NASA卫星数据原本可能帮助我们了解全球变暖，但现在这些数据已经无法读取了。这可真是“前车之鉴”，让我们领教了数字化事物的“无常”。
foreignization: 问题到底有多糟糕？ 数字事物永远丢失的例子比比皆是，其中一些具有个人规模，一些是全球性的。由于原始软件不再可用，可以随意侵犯的软件专利，阻止了专利持有者证明先前的艺术。 20世纪60年代末纽约州编制的土地利用和自然资源清单，由于需要打开文件的定制软件不复存在，无法访问。 1970年代美国国家航空航天局的卫星数据，本可以帮助我们了解全球变暖，如果它们今天不是不能被读取的话。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Just how bad is the problem ? Examples of digital things lost forever abound , some personal in scale , some global . Software patents that can be infringed freely because the original software no longer works , preventing the patent holders from proving prior art . Land use and natural-resource inventories for the State of New York compiled in the late 1960s that ca n't be accessed because the customized software needed to open the files no longer exists . NASA satellite data from the 1970s that might have helped us understand global warming , were they not unreadable today .

source: But here 's the thing : Worrying about a fatty food you rarely eat steers emphasis away from more pressing matters . " Instead , we should focus on portion size , eating frequency and getting a variety of foods -- which are all simple behaviors to change , " says Dr. Callaway . And since the major reason for obesity is decreased activity levels , he says , better to emphasize the importance of getting a daily jog rather than switching from hot buttered kernels to chocolate raisins at the cinema .
domestication: 话说回来，担心你很少吃的高脂肪食物，其实会让你忽略更重要的问题。与其纠结这些问题，我们不如关注一下食用的分量、进食频率以及饮食的多样性——这些都是可以轻松改善的习惯。卡勒威博士说，由于肥胖最主要的原因是活动量减少，所以我们不如强调每天运动的重要性，而不是在电影院里从热黄油爆米花换成巧克力葡萄干。
foreignization: 但事情是这样的：担心很少吃的高脂肪食物会将人们对更迫切问题的关注转移开去。“相反，我们应该关注食用份量、进食频率以及摄入多种食物——这些都是简单易改的习惯”，卡拉威博士说。而且由于肥胖的主要原因是活动水平降低，他说，强调每天慢跑的重要性比在电影院里把热黄油爆米花换成巧克力葡萄干更好。

source: Unfortunately , this help is n't reaching caregivers from minority groups . A 1987 survey conducted in several states with large populations found that minority individuals made up only 6 percent of a sample of 2,300 caregivers who were using community services to assist relatives with Alzheimer 's or other types of dementia .
domestication: 不幸的是，这样的帮助并没有传递给少数族裔的照顾者。 1987 年在几个有大量人口的州进行的一项调查发现，少数族裔个人仅占使用社区服务来帮助患有阿尔茨海默症或其他类型痴呆症的亲属的 2300 名照顾者样本中的 6% 。这说明少数族裔的照顾者缺乏相关的帮助和支持，这是一个令人担忧的问题。

source: ? Earlier in Burke 's career , Katie notes , his wardrobe was " heavily informed " by the late , legendary head coach Pat Quinn . " You had your tie tied , jacket on , all that stuff , " she says . " But it was heavily predicated on convenience . " For instance , Brian orders custom , monogrammed white dress shirts in bulk . He also holds a serious interest in cufflinks , which still remain acceptable holiday gifts from relatives . They do not buy him ties anymore . There is no point .
domestication: 伯克在早年的时候，衣柜的风格深受传奇教练帕特·奎恩的影响。凯蒂说，当时伯克穿衣服“非常讲究”，总是打着领带，穿着西装等等。但其实，这些都很方便，因为他有很多一样的衣服。比如，他会大量定制带有姓名首字母的白色衬衫。另外，他对袖扣也非常感兴趣，家人每次过节都会送他一些新的。他不再需要别人送他领带了，那样实在没什么意义。

source: Among the evidence that Waymo reiterates in the current filing is that certain components of even the later " Fuji " sensor are " nearly identical to those in Waymo 's device . " The filing also questions the timeline of Uber 's development process , which it suggests was far too fast to have been truly independent .

source: As we 've written before , sorting congressional districts by the two variables of race and education produces what we call the four quadrants of Congress : districts with high levels of racial diversity and high levels of white education ( what we call " hi-hi " districts ) , districts with high levels of racial diversity and low levels of white education ( " hi-lo districts " ) , districts with low levels of diversity and high levels of white education ( " lo-hi districts " ) , and districts with low levels of diversity and low levels of white education ( " lo-lo districts " ) .  Hi-Hi Districts
domestication: 我们之前也写过，按照种族和受教育水平这两个变量对国会选区进行排序，会产生我们所说的国会的四个象限：种族多样性高、白人受教育水平高的选区（我们称之为“高高”选区），种族多样性高、白人受教育水平低的选区（“高低”选区），种族多样性低、白人受教育水平高的选区（“低高”选区），以及种族多样性低、白人受教育水平低的选区（“低低”选区）。高高选区通常来说都是些城市化程度较高、经济发展相对较好的地区，像纽约、洛杉矶、旧金山或者波士顿这样的大城市就属于这一类。这些地方的居民受教育程度普遍较高，收入也比较丰厚，当然，房价也就水涨船高。高高选区的选民往往更加开放、更加倾向于自由主义，他们在选举中投票支持民主党的可能性更大。

Hi-Hi Districts

source: The first is that the Affordable Care Act is a misnomer ? in other words , it does n't really provide " affordable care " ? because the newly insured on Medicaid ca n't find doctors who will see them , and the ones with private coverage are stuck with high out-of-pocket costs that make even modest medical treatment prohibitively expensive .

source: Ritchie was a miniaturist in an age when writers are judged by the number of trees cut down to print their work . He wrote only short stories , and he tried to do so without wasting a word . His work was sprightly and surprising and always engaging , and he never wrote an awkward sentence or a lifeless line of dialogue .
domestication: 里奇的写作风格很独特，那个年代的作家常常被判定标准是他们的作品印刷出来需要砍伐多少树，而他却只写短篇故事，而且力求做到字字珠玑。他笔下的作品轻松有趣、充满惊喜、总能引人入胜，每一句话都很流畅，每一段对话都很生动，从不写出拗口的句子或枯燥的台词。
foreignization: 里奇是那个时代的微型小说家，当时作家的作品会根据印刷出来需要砍伐掉的树木数量来判断。他只写短篇故事，并且尝试在不浪费一个字的情况下完成它们。他的作品生动有趣且总是引人入胜，而且他从未写出过生硬的句子或毫无生气的对话。

source: How such people get there requires a lot of pretzel logic , so bear with me : They start with a false premise , that feminism requires that no woman ever say an uncharitable thing about another woman . ( This has never actually been a requirement of feminism , or how could we criticize women like Sarah Palin or Phyllis Schlafly ? ) Then they zero in on the fact that Clinton said not-nice things on occasion about her husband 's mistresses . They then pretend to be all appalled about what a terrible sexist she is , and claim she can no longer allowed to say anything about real sexism ever again .
domestication: 这样的逻辑很扭曲，所以大家请耐心听我说：他们首先从一个错误的前提开始，就是认为女权主义要求女人永远不能对另一个女人说刻薄的话。（这从来都不是女权主义的要求，如果是这样，我们怎么能批评像萨拉·佩林或菲利斯·施拉夫利这样的女性呢？）然后，他们集中注意力于克林顿偶尔会对她丈夫的情妇说不友善的话。接着，他们假装对她的行为感到十分震惊，声称她是个糟糕的性别歧视者，并宣称她再也不能谈论真正的性别歧视问题了。
foreignization: 要了解这样的人如何得出这样的结论需要大量的曲折逻辑，请大家跟着我想：他们首先以一个错误的前提开始，这个前提是，女权主义要求没有女性对其他女性说不友善的话。（这从来都不是女权主义的要求，要不然我们又怎么批评像萨拉·佩林或菲莉斯·施拉夫利这样的女性呢？）然后，他们集中关注克林顿偶尔对她丈夫的情妇说过不友善的话的事实。接着，他们假装对她是一个多么可怕的性别歧视者感到震惊，并声称她再也不能对真正的性别歧视说任何话了。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

How such people get there requires a lot of pretzel logic , so bear with me : They start with a false premise , that feminism requires that no woman ever say an uncharitable thing about another woman . ( This has never actually been a requirement of feminism , or how could we criticize women like Sarah Palin or Phyllis Schlafly ? ) Then they zero in on the fact that Clinton said not-nice things on occasion about her husband 's mistresses . They then pretend to be all appalled about what a terrible sexist she is , and claim she can no longer allowed to say anything about real sexism ever again .
这样的逻辑很扭曲，所以大家请耐心听我说：他们首先从一个错误的前提开始，就是认为女权主义要求女人永远不能对另一个女人说刻薄的话。（这从来都不是女权主义的要求，如果是这样，我们怎么能批评像萨拉·佩林或菲利斯·施拉夫利这样的女性呢？）然后，他们集中注意力于克林顿偶尔会对她丈夫的情妇说不友善的话。接着，他们假装对她的行为感到十分震惊，声称她是个糟糕的性别歧视者，并宣称她再也不能谈论真正的性别歧视问题了。

source: MCR eventually moved in anyway , but rather than leasing out the sixth floor from Davey , the company leased the fourth floor from Albion Pacific at a rate lower than Davey could afford to give . Not only that , but when MCR CEO Matthew Harrigan hired his own contractors to complete the connection to WinStar 's T1 line and subtracted the charges from its rent payment to Albion , Meieran turned around and submitted the bills to Davey . After all , under the terms of Davey and Albion 's agreement , the building should have been fully Internet-enabled already , and Davey was contractually accountable for any associated expenses .
domestication: 结果MCR还是搬进来了，不过他们并没有从Davey那里租第六层，而是以低于Davey能承受的价格从Albion Pacific租了第四层。更过分的是，MCR的CEO Matthew Harrigan还自己雇了装修队来连接WinStar的T1线，并从付给Albion的租金中扣除这些费用。而Meieran则转头把账单送给了Davey。毕竟按照Davey和Albion的协议，整个大楼应该已经全网通了，任何相关的开支Davey都要负责。
foreignization: MCR最终还是搬进去了，但与其从Davey那里租用六楼，不如说这家公司以低于Davey能承受的价格从Albion Pacific那里租用了四楼。不仅如此，当MCR CEO Matthew Harrigan雇佣自己的承包商来完成连接到WinStar的T1线并从付给Albion的租金中扣除相关费用时，Meieran反过来将账单提交给了Davey。毕竟，在Davey和Albion协议的条款下，这栋建筑应该已经完全实现了互联网接入，而Davey在合同中也对此负责的任何费用都负有责任。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

MCR eventually moved in anyway , but rather than leasing out the sixth floor from Davey , the company leased the fourth floor from Albion Pacific at a rate lower than Davey could afford to give . Not only that , but when MCR CEO Matthew Harrigan hired his own contractors to complete the connection to WinStar 's T1 line and subtracted the charges from its rent payment to Albion , Meieran turned around and submitted the bills to Davey . After all , under the terms of Davey and Albion 's agreement , the building should have been fully Internet-enabled already , and Davey was contractually accountable for any associated expenses .

source: The first signs of spring signal a clear change on the stove top . Farewell , slow-cook methods , such as simmering and braising ... hello , speedy techniques , such as stir- frying ! Whether you 're making sauce-coated tofu with bok choy or an East- meets-West spin on lemony asparagus , the same rules of stir-frying apply to give spring vegetables a hint of savory caramelization while keeping their fresh flavor intact : have all ingredients chopped , measured , and ready to go ; keep your wok very hot ; and , whateveryou do , do n't stop stirring .
domestication: 春天来了，炉灶上也换了新气象。慢炖的日子一去不返，取而代之的是快速出菜的快炒技术。不管是做菠菜豆腐还是柠檬芦笋，这套快炒法都能让蔬菜带有美味的焦糖化味道，同时保持它们的新鲜：所有材料都要准备好，切好、量好、码好；锅一定要热；而且，无论如何，也不能停下炒勺。只要这三点做到位，春天的蔬菜就能在你的厨艺下展现出最鲜活的风采。
foreignization: 春天的第一迹象在炉灶上表现出明显的变化。再见，慢煮方法，比如炖煮和烧烤……你好，快速技术，比如炒！无论你是制作酱汁包裹豆腐配菠菜还是给带有柠檬味道的芦笋添加东方与西方的风格，相同的炒法规则适用于给春季蔬菜添加一丝美味焦糖化，同时保持它们新鲜的口感：所有食材都必须切好，量好，并准备就绪；保持你的锅非常热；并且，无论如何，都不要停止搅拌。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

The first signs of spring signal a clear change on the stove top . Farewell , slow-cook methods , such as simmering and braising ... hello , speedy techniques , such as stir- frying ! Whether you 're making sauce-coated tofu with bok choy or an East- meets-West spin on lemony asparagus , the same rules of stir-frying apply to give spring vegetables a hint of savory caramelization while keeping their fresh flavor intact : have all ingredients chopped , measured , and ready to go ; keep your wok very hot ; and , whateveryou do , do n't stop stirring .

Translate the following text to Chinese.

The first signs of spring signal a clear change on the stove top . Farewell , slow-cook methods , such as simmering and braising ... hello , speedy techniques , such as stir- frying ! Whether you 're making sauce-coated tofu with bok choy or an East- meets-West spin on lemony asparagus , the same rules of stir-frying apply to give spring vegetables a hint of savory caramelization while keeping their fresh flavor intact : have all ingredients chopped , measured , and ready to go ; keep your wok very hot ; and , whateveryou do , do n't stop stirring .
春天的第一迹象在炉灶上表现出明显的变化。再见，慢煮方法，比如炖煮和烧烤……你好，快速技术，比如炒！无论你是制作酱汁包裹豆腐配菠菜还是给带有柠檬味道的芦笋添加东方与西方的风格，相同的炒法规则适用于给春季蔬菜添加一丝美味焦糖化，同时保持它们新鲜的口感：所有食材都必须切好，量好，并准备就绪；保持你的锅非常热；并且，无论如何，都不要停止搅拌。

source: The key to working with Moche art has been to photograph objects in museums and private collections throughout the world . In the Moche Archive , located on the campus of the University of California in Los Angeles ( UCLA ) , we now have more than 135,000 photographs of such objects , all organized by subject matter . Photographs of objects depicting deer hunting , for example , are kept together , as are those of objects depicting architecture , warfare , and distinct ceremonies . This archive serves as an important resource for the study of Moche culture .
domestication: 研究莫切艺术的关键就在于拍摄遍布全球博物馆和私人收藏的文物。在位于洛杉矶加州大学校内的莫切档案馆里，我们已经收集了超过13.5万张这些文物的照片，并且按照主题进行整理。例如，描绘鹿狩猎的文物照片都放在一起，同样，描绘建筑、战争和不同仪式的照片也各自归类。这份档案对于研究莫切文化来说是一个非常重要的资源。
foreignization: 处理莫切艺术的关键是拍摄博物馆和世界各地私人收藏中的物品。在位于加利福尼亚大学洛杉矶分校（UCLA）的莫切档案馆中，我们现在有超过13.5万张此类物品的照片，所有照片都按主题组织。在这里，例如，描绘鹿狩猎的物品的照片被放在一起，而描绘建筑、战争和不同仪式的物品的照片也被放在一起。这个档案馆作为研究莫切文化的重要资源。

The key to working with Moche art has been to photograph objects in museums and private collections throughout the world . In the Moche Archive , located on the campus of the University of California in Los Angeles ( UCLA ) , we now have more than 135,000 photographs of such objects , all organized by subject matter . Photographs of objects depicting deer hunting , for example , are kept together , as are those of objects depicting architecture , warfare , and distinct ceremonies . This archive serves as an important resource for the study of Moche culture .
研究莫切艺术的关键就在于拍摄遍布全球博物馆和私人收藏的文物。在位于洛杉矶加州大学校内的莫切档案馆里，我们已经收集了超过13.5万张这些文物的照片，并且按照主题进行整理。例如，描绘鹿狩猎的文物照片都放在一起，同样，描绘建筑、战争和不同仪式的照片也各自归类。这份档案对于研究莫切文化来说是一个非常重要的资源。

In the Moche Archive , located on the campus of the University of California in Los Angeles ( UCLA ) , we now have more than 135,000 photographs of such objects , all organized by subject matter . Photographs of objects depicting deer hunting , for example , are kept together , as are those of objects depicting architecture , warfare , and distinct ceremonies . This archive serves as an important resource for the study of Moche culture .
处理莫切艺术的关键是拍摄博物馆和世界各地私人收藏中的物品。在位于加利福尼亚大学洛杉矶分校（UCLA）的莫切档案馆中，我们现在有超过13.5万张此类物品的照片，所有照片都按主题组织。在这里，例如，描绘鹿狩猎的物品的照片被放在一起，而描绘建筑、战争和不同仪式的物品的照片也被放在一起。这个档案馆作为研究莫切文化的重要资源。

source: Seneca had prophesied , " The time will come when every land shall yield its hidden treasure ; when men no more shall unknown course measure , for round the world no ' farthest land ' shall be . " Columbus knew such words well . They fired his imagination and allayed his fears . HOW DID COLUMBUS RECRUIT HIS CREW ?
domestication: 参议员塞内加曾预言：“有一天，每块土地都会吐出它的隐藏宝藏；到那时，人们不再需要测量未知的航线，因为整个世界都没有‘最远的国度’。”哥伦布对这些话耳熟能详，这些话点燃了他的想象力，也消除了他心中的恐惧。那么，哥伦布是如何招募他的船员呢？

source: This lack of clarity also distorts the view of policymakers about what is happening in the Middle East and so they daydream about democratic movements when the reality on the ground is more populist than democratic . The principal beneficiary of populism is more likely to be the Muslim Brotheihood than the local spokesman for Facebook . The credo of the Muslim Brotherhood is succinct and chilling : Allah is our goal ; the Prophet Muhammad is our leader ; the Qu ' ran is our constitution ; jihad is our way ; and death in the way of Allah is our promised end .
domestication: 这种模糊的认知还会扭曲政策制定者对中东局势的看法，导致他们在梦想中幻想民主运动的出现，而实际上当地的情况则更倾向于民粹主义而非民主。民粹主义的最大受益者可能是穆斯林兄弟会，而不是Facebook上的本地发言人。穆斯林兄弟会的信条简洁却令人毛骨悚然：“真主是我们的目标；先知穆罕默德是我们的领袖；古兰经是我们的宪法；圣战是我们的道路；为真主而死是我们的誓言。”
foreignization: 这种缺乏清晰度也扭曲了政策制定者对中东发生的事情的看法，因此他们在梦想着民主运动的时候，事实上，眼前的事实更像是民粹主义而非民主运动。民粹主义的主要受益者更可能是穆斯林兄弟会，而不是Facebook当地的发言人。穆斯林兄弟会的信条简洁且令人毛骨悚然：真主是我们的目标；先知穆罕默德是我们的领袖；古兰经是我们的宪法；圣战是我们的道路；死在真主的道路上是我们的承诺结局。

The credo of the Muslim Brotherhood is succinct and chilling : Allah is our goal ; the Prophet Muhammad is our leader ; the Qu ' ran is our constitution ; jihad is our way ; and death in the way of Allah is our promised end .

source: Yes , she 'd watched the new TV show Who Wants to Be a Millionaire -- has n't everyone ? -- and sure , it was good money , but she just could n't be bothered to call in . " Who 's got time to sit there on the phone ? " Her 11-year-old son , Harrison , thought otherwise : He knew his mom could win . So when it was announced that the show was being extended for three more episodes , he began calling ABC 's toll-free contestant hotline . When he eventually got through , he put his mother on the phone , and , as predicted , the Plymouth , Minn. , clinical laboratory scientist easily nailed the first round .
domestication: 她确实看过那档新电视节目《谁想成为百万富翁》，谁没看过呢？的确，那是一个赚大钱的好机会，不过她就是懒得打电话报名。“谁有空坐在那里等电话？”她的11岁儿子哈里森却不这么想，他坚信妈妈能赢。当宣布该节目将增加三集时，他开始拨打ABC的免费参赛热线。最后，终于接通了电话，他把妈妈叫过来接听电话，就像预料的一样，来自明尼苏达州普利茅斯的实验室科学家轻松通过了第一轮。

source: The only rule that governs the placement of dinner napkins on the table is : Keep them neat and attractive . They can sit in any number of places : to the left of the dinner plates with the forks resting either on top or alongside , blossoming out of the water goblets as if they were flowers , folded neatly and resting flat in the center of the dinner plates , or shaped in any number of artistic ways and , again , set in the center of the dinner plates .
domestication: 摆放餐巾的唯一规矩是：整洁好看就行。餐巾可以放在任何地方：可以放在晚餐盘子的左边，叉子可以放在上面或旁边；也可以像花一样从水杯里“绽放”出来；或者可以整齐地折叠后平放在晚餐盘子的中间；甚至可以折成各种艺术形状，然后再放在盘子中间。总之，只要好看就行！
foreignization: 唯一的规则来管理晚餐餐巾在桌子上的摆放位置是：保持它们整洁和有吸引力。它们可以坐在任意多个地方：在晚餐盘子的左边，叉子放在上面或旁边，盛开于水杯中，如同花朵一样，从晚餐盘子的中心整齐地折叠并平放，或者以任意多种艺术方式形状，并再次放在晚餐盘子的中心。
